If we get our way, maybe ”The Apprentice: White House Edition” will be airing on a network near you come February 2021.** [**I bet it’ll be ‘**** _must watch_****’ television. But if we’re going to get the show on the air, we've got to make sure President Trump has time to shoot it first! Can you help us make that happen by making a donation to our campaign today?**](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuysllVwaCEl8bsOhaMhhWlM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191107_fr_s&n=2) | | [DONATE ⇨](https://weld2020.nationbuilder.com/r?u=sTrCoaT-YmDhY88aC-xe_3F5VNQquXw1tKM69PB7U23HvggvoZ_zOOINCNDzJ03kY9fRhi-ZgWDwlpLRkGMKuysllVwaCEl8bsOhaMhhWlM&e=6bbde6f28245738982c2a8d24644af48&utm_source=weld2020&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20191107_fr_s&n=3)

name: Team Hunt
subject: Join us for a Veterans Reception for Wesley Hunt!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Earlier this month, the White House declared November to be **National Veterans & Military Families Month**.

With that declaration and Veterans Day right around the corner, we’re excited to announce a special Veterans Reception for Wesley Hunt on Wednesday, November 20th from 6pm-8pm at Chuy’s Tex-Mex in Bunker Hill.

Stop by for some free food, drinks and to support West Point Graduate and combat veteran Wesley Hunt in his run for Congress.

[Click here to RSVP!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a130c6149b164888b6f2abbfe8268328&_e=VF53KR1XRLcoQFZhkkJZ9FmRN7AR6Ztq1B5sgXHu6gyVeJTGirJ8LvxW5sxnK3ezD54KiMmHYm4orZ5keR7cD21W04zaehUk-9XGJEKXuM3tBJBBFfoOQKhHcJD3eJBXl06JrmQ52TuUUXi3jz9jIKaXuqAtOJ3UuPelstB2-sl3CwSWvu5_XZ90S5nyxqxl6H7IvU4I8xHoEg2M12U5rEQapZaUvszc2FmocvWuxflMZEHf2EJdRZGPouy2GknL4IYTT6SMlysp7ypDBoGBso91icSsHsb5IL8Aw6KmB9k%3D)

Wesley is running to protect our values and our way of life, just like he did as an Apache Helicopter pilot in Iraq.

We hope you can join us for this free reception on November 20th.

[Click Here to RSVP today!](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=a130c6149b164888b6f2abbfe8268328&_e=VF53KR1XRLcoQFZhkkJZ9FmRN7AR6Ztq1B5sgXHu6gyVeJTGirJ8LvxW5sxnK3ezD54KiMmHYm4orZ5keR7cD7lEOj0c6ETqZP77U2BHVauwnJFfhjVyPJ8fuekimyx6V47MJXOSqb682KmZZQBGcoZOqagVF6raAmg-3wwk2O49eq0cejb4OWC5swwqtrn__le0g6_qGVz-IzQEWeikAJTze5fYZpqHbGSl9agotcL3s8AhO6ee7MtcquSLuqV24AhdBhQVy5XMx6XVVDIfFmXomTd7ufmP3fh_2NTaBM8%3D)

All the best,
Team Hunt

name: Ed Markey
subject: A catastrophic picture
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team,

On Sunday, I'll be at Stonehill College participating in the Massachusetts Climate Debate. I was inspired to challenge all the Senate candidates to a stand-alone climate debate after marching with the thousands of young people demanding action at the Climate Strike in Boston.

As the planet burns, seas rise, and storms devastate every corner of the country, you have the right to know how your U.S. Senate candidates will combat the climate crisis.

You know where I stand. **We need a Green New Deal.**

Reports from both the U.N. and 13 federal agencies paint a catastrophic picture if we do not act on climate change.

Facing our greatest planetary challenge, Donald Trump and the Republicans have chosen to do nothing.

Their inaction is criminal.

That's why I'm fighting every day to pass a Green New Deal and set our country on a course to combat the climate crisis.

_**[I need your help in this fight. Will you pitch in $27 or more and help us raise $25,000 before Sunday's debate? We need to show grassroots Democrats are standing up and ready to fight for a Green New Deal.](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-110719_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Thanks in advance for standing with me against this crisis,

Ed

**[DONATE](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-110719_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Save Minnesota's Senate Seat
subject: MSNBC's Chris Hayes is watching Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
There's no question that all eyes are on Minnesota and Tina's race. We can't sit back with all of this national attention. Can you help?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191107hayes-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") | **MSNBC's CHRIS HAYES: MINNESOTA IS COMPETITIVE**

**We need to act now in order to protect Tina's seat.

[CONTRIBUTE $10 NOW TO KEEP MINNESOTA BLUE >>](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191107hayes-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
---

188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb, all eyes are on Minnesota.

_The New York Times_ is reporting that the Trump campaign is planning to spend tens of millions of dollars in Minnesota. It's not just Trump who is paying attention. _The Washington Post_ states that Minnesota could be key to the Republicans' strategy to hold their Senate majority.

**And since Trump narrowly lost here in 2016, MSNBC's Chris Hayes is calling Minnesota competitive in 2020.**

With all of this focus on Minnesota, Tina needs to look strong to hold off the Republican threats.

**We're less than a year away from Election Day, and everything we do from here on out is crucial to protect Tina's seat, flip the Senate, and keep Minnesota blue.**

**[We can't sit back in this election. Rush a $10 donation right now if you have Tina's back.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-email-nov2019?refcode=em191107hayes-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

body:

---
**[Donate to MJ Hegar so she can fight for US in the Senate>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890852/7f51f7bc/4bc1c593/4ef0b35e/3964566085/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-tx?refcode=email_20191107.2nd__484__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
Peter,

John Cornyn may be Texas' Senator, but he's sure not serving us. For nearly two decades, he's done the bidding of DC bosses like Mitch McConnell and his special interest allies. Now's our chance to vote him out and send MJ Hegar to fight for us in the Senate. **[Pitch in now to help>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890852/7f51f7bc/4bc1c593/4ef0b35e/3964566085/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-tx?refcode=email_20191107.2nd__484__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

You can follow the money from Senator Cornyn's big-money backers to his actions in Washington:
* **He 's taken more than $1.4 million from the insurance industry.** And this month, Sen. Cornyn voted to undermine protections for preexisting conditions by allowing insurance companies to sell junk plans. **[Help us elect a senator who will protect access to health care>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890852/7f51f7bc/4bc1c593/4ef0b35e/3964566085/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-tx?refcode=email_20191107.2nd__484__&amount=10&recurring=true")**
* **He 's accepted $210,190 from the gun lobby, including $1,000 from the NRA just two weeks after the shooting in El Paso, Texas.** Since then, he's spoken out against universal background checks.
* **He 's banked more than $90,000 from private detention company PACs and executives, including those running camps at the border**, and defended his DC bosses and their inhumane family separation policy.

The answer to "who is Senator John Cornyn serving?" is: **clearly, not us**. That's exactly why we need to elect MJ Hegar. She'll fight for us in the Senate and always put the people first.
**[Pitch in to help send MJ to fight for us in the Senate>>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64890852/7f51f7bc/4bc1c593/4ef0b35e/3964566085/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjQ4NCJ9/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-donation-tx?refcode=email_20191107.2nd__484__&amount=10&recurring=true")**

body:
| | |

| Team, Don't know if you've seen the news, but there is another candidate likely entering the Democratic primary for president. It's late in the game, yet Michael Bloomberg is planning to file petitions tomorrow to get on the presidential ballot in Alabama, one of the primary states with an early filing deadline. **We already have one self-funding billionaire in this race, and it looks like we just got another.** **[Michael Bloomberg will likely be spending millions of his own personal fortune to fund his campaign. Can you rush a donation right now to help us stay competitive?](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191107_BHQ_20191107-fr-BHQ-Bloomberg-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Cory has been in this race for over nine months now. He didn't enter with high name recognition or a huge amount of campaign cash already in the bank. And he certainly doesn't have billions of dollars in personal wealth to self-fund his presidential run. Our campaign refuses to take money from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or fossil fuel or pharma executives. This campaign is 100% people-powered and people-driven. **That 's why we rely on supporters just like you giving $1, $5, and even $20 contributions to keep us going.** **Will you chip in right now to help us raise the resources we need?** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Julian for the Future
body:
Do you believe I deserve a spot in the next Democratic debates? | | |
---
| |
---
| | | **DEMOCRATIC DEBATE POLL** **FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com** Quickly -- the DNC just announced I need 200,000 Democratic supporters to qualify for the next debates. And moments ago, I learned I'm now only 13,000 away! **13,000 RESPONSES NEEDED: Do you believe I deserve a spot in the next Democratic debates?** [**_YES! >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f7/929976600/VEsH/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191107_em_pet_b3_castro_all") **[_No_](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f7/929976600/VEsE/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191107_em_pet_b3_castro_all")**
---

I need you to know 3 things:

**FIRST:** You helped rescue my campaign from shutting down.

**THEN:** The DNC announced I need support from 200,000 Democrats to make the next debates.

**NOW:** I just learned I'm only 13,000 supporters away!

You've stood by me through every obstacle my campaign has faced.

I'm asking you to have my back one more time in this final push.

[**_I 'm counting on you to take my poll before midnight to show you want to see me on that next debate stage. I'm only 13,000 responses from reaching my goal -- will you be one of them? >>_**](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f7/929976600/VEsF/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/julian-priorities-survey?source=20191107_em_pet_b3_castro_all")

Thank you,

Julian
| | | | | | | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f6/929976600/VEsC/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://twitter.com/JulianCastro")
---
| | [](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f5/929976600/VEsD/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://www.facebook.com/Julian-Castro-97458155742/")

| Contributions or gifts to Julian for the Future are not tax deductible.

No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f3/929976600/VEsB/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f2/929976600/VEsO/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc80f/3eb3e2fc/563a61d0/744d97f1/929976600/VEsP/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Marc=20Flores?=
subject: Restoring the Promise of America
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Marc Flores for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/marcflores?utm_source=Marc+Flores+for+Congress&utm_campaign=4b3fbc8283-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2019_10_16_08_11_COPY_02&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_b08c1b6182-4b3fbc8283-32267927
Hello Peter,

Born in our great state of Texas, I was raised by a public school teacher and a small business owner. Growing up, they taught me the meaning of hard work and the importance of giving back to my community. But in this time, I also learned how dedicated people can still struggle to make ends meet.

No matter how hard they worked, it seemed like so much of our community was being left behind. Every year prices would soar and paychecks would stay the same. It was then that I started to realize just how broken our system really is, and that the American Dream might be slipping away.

But this doesn’t have to be the case. Those in power want us to believe that the world we live in is fair and that the rules apply to everyone equally. This is just not true. We need decisive leaders who are unafraid to take on Washington. We need people who are willing to roll up their sleeves and fight for our community.

As a builder for the last 20 years, I’m ready to put my experience to use. I will cut through the political fear and egotism that permeates Congress, and build a coalition that serves a common purpose.

It’s time for change. It’s time for a leader with the resounding energy and ability to step up to fix what’s broken and restore the promise of opportunity that America was founded upon. #WeCanDoBetter #FloresForUs

- Marc

| [Jeff Sessions is set to enter the Alabama Senate race to unseat Doug Jones. We have to act fast. Will you split a donation between our campaigns to fight back? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae62/134673f2/a6096e2/6997c22b/2280472904/VEsH/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-jones?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")
* * *

Friends -

Two years ago when Doug Jones was elected, Democrats proved that if we can win in deep red Alabama, we can win _anywhere_.

[But today news broke that Jeff Sessions will officially enter the Alabama Senate race to unseat Doug!](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae62/134673f2/a6096e2/6997c22a/2280472904/VEsE/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-jones?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

Over his career in politics, Jeff Sessions has supported a constitutional amendment to ban same-sex marriage, fought to separate families at the border, and worked to strip away the Affordable Care Act's protections for pre-existing conditions.

We know the Jeff Sessions playbook: [_Extremism and division._](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae62/134673f2/a6096e2/6997c22a/2280472904/VEsF/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-jones?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

He's going to try to win back the South by sowing division wherever he can.

Doug, on the other hand, dedicated his life to fighting for civil rights, justice, and equality for all.

As a United States Attorney, he successfully convicted two former Klansmen for the murder of four innocent children in the bombing of the 16th Street Baptist Church.

Today, he serves in the Senate as a voice of reason in the turmoil of modern Washington - bringing the hope of justice back to Alabama leadership.

Doug Jones knows the people of Alabama, and he knows they won't stand for Jeff Sessions' old tricks.

[With our help, I know Doug will win this.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae62/134673f2/a6096e2/6997c22a/2280472904/VEsC/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-jones?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

[But this will be an uphill battle since Jeff Sessions already has $2.5 MILLION stowed away in his campaign war chest. Will you split a donation between our campaigns today to fight back? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae62/134673f2/a6096e2/6997c22b/2280472904/VEsD/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bennet-jones?refcode=EM_FR_B2_110719_AC_ND&recurring=auto&amount=1&amounts=10,29,50,100,250,500,1000")

body:
The wealthy and well connected are scared. They're scared that under a Warren presidency, they would no longer have a government that caters to their every need. So they're doing whatever they can... | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528fa0/45c30650/107adb8a8/66f5fffc/3091554894/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")

**First** , Elizabeth Warren released the Ultra-Millionaire Tax -- a two-cent tax on great fortunes above $50 million that would pay for Universal Child Care, cancelling student loan debt for 95% of people that have it, a minimum $50 billion investment in Historically Black Colleges and Universities and Minority-Serving Institutions, and much, much more.

**Then** , some of the wealthy few that would be affected by the tax started sounding the alarm -- going on national television, literally shedding tears, writing op-eds, and trying to stop our movement in its tracks.

**And now, just moments ago, news broke that Michael Bloomberg -- one of the first billionaires to attack Elizabeth's plan for a wealth tax -- is taking steps to enter the Democratic primary for president in 2020.**

**The wealthy and well connected are scared.** They're scared that under a Warren presidency, they would no longer have a government that caters to their every need. So they're doing whatever they can to try to stop Elizabeth and our movement from winning in 2020 and bringing big, structural change in 2021.

**[Let's defeat the billionaires and make our government and economy work for working people. >
Let's call Michael Bloomberg's attempt to buy the presidency for what it is: Yet another example of the wealthy wanting our government and economy to only work for themselves.

When faced with the prospect of paying his fair share in taxes so that we can level the playing field for working families, Bloomberg has chosen to protect his wealth over everyone else -- and that's why he'd rather spend enormous amounts of money on a presidential run than pay taxes.

**And we have to fight our hearts out to stop it.**

Your support matters because Elizabeth isn't self-funding, she doesn't have a Super PAC, and we don't host any fundraisers where wealthy donors write big checks to spend time with her behind closed doors.

That means this campaign is funded by people like you chipping in whatever you can to emails like this. You shouldn't have to be a billionaire to run for president, but that means we need a grassroots movement. And we need your help today.

**[Chip in $3 to fight back against Michael Bloomberg and the greedy billionaires that are trying to stop our movement.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528fa0/45c30650/107adb8a8/66f5fffe/3091554894/VEsEBg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDQ2Rl9SRVNfTkZGX0NfMjAxOTExMDdfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML46F_RES_NFF_C_20191107_V1S2_P_T1")**

Thanks,

Team Warren

P.S. Michael Bloomberg would pay over $3 billion next year under Elizabeth's wealth tax. **[Chip in to help make it happen.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528fa0/45c30650/107adb8a8/66f5fffe/3091554894/VEsEAQ/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDQ2Rl9SRVNfTkZGX0NfMjAxOTExMDdfVjFTMl9QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML46F_RES_NFF_C_20191107_V1S2_P_T1")**

name: Team Chabot
subject: SBA List’s Musgrave: “Congressman Steve Chabot An Unwavering Champion For The Unborn”
body:
Today's Democrats have gone to a whole new extreme. Just when we thought they couldn't get further to the left, today's Democrats are now calling for widespread socialism, universal healthcare, the Green New Deal, slavery reparations, open borders, and even infanticide. No Images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-k/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-r/) **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**Thursday, November 7, 2019CONTACT: Jon ConradiPHONE: ‪(513) 202-4023 _**SBA List 's **_**Musgrave _: "Congressman Steve Chabot An Unwavering Champion For The Unborn"_**_National Pro-Life Organization "__Proud to Enthusiastically Support " Chabot_CINCINNATI - Marilyn Musgrave, former member of Congress and vice president of government affairs for Susan B. Anthony List, a leading national pro-life grassroots organization, called Rep. Steve Chabot (R-OH-01) "an unwavering champion for the unborn" in a statement of support Thursday."Congressman Steve Chabot has been an unwavering champion for the unborn, successfully leading the fight to ban barbaric partial-birth abortions," said Musgrave. "We are proud to enthusiastically support him as he fights Nancy Pelosi and her radical abortion agenda in the U.S. House."Chabot thanked Musgrave and SBA List for their support and pledged to continue fighting against radical policies in Washington."Democrats in Washington are determined to advance a radical agenda that includes extreme pro-abortion policies, open borders, the Green New Deal and a ban on private health insurance," Chabot said. "I will continue fighting to stop the Democrats' out-of-touch agenda and deliver common sense conservative results for Ohio families and am honored to have the support of organizations like SBA List in that battle."Chabot will enter 2020 with unified and overwhelming support from conservatives and the Republican Party. In recent weeks, in addition to SBA List, Chabot's campaign has announced support and endorsements from [Hamilton County GOP Chairman Alex M. Triantafilou and Warren County GOP Chairman Jeff Monroe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-y/), [Ohio Republican Party Chairman Jane Timken](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-j/), [Rep. Jim Jordan (R-OH-04)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-t/) and the influential conservative organization [Club for Growth Action](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-i/) that vowed to "vigorously defend and support him to win and keep his seat."### | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-d/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jdhljjhl-kujkulhluu-h/)

name: Ben Salango
subject: When we talk about the issues that matter - WE WIN!
body:
Friend,

On Tuesday night, the nation watched as Democrat Andy Beshear took the lead against Matt Bevin to be Kentucky's next Governor. Many did not think it was possible for a Democrat to win in Kentucky, even with a govenor as polarizing as Matt Bevin.
But Andy's win on Tuesday showed you and the rest of the country that we CAN win in red states, shocking the political establishment and proving that when we talk about the issues that matter most to the people on the ground - we win!

**[That is exactly why I am running for Governor in West Virginia and why I need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11656444/118936233/-690639319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWE0MmJmNC0zMjAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_GfAgBP3O6k3jcfGAcOu3pqGw_rWcNrLhkqXIEk53k=)**

* **Strengthening public education - **Our West Virginia teachers started a movement several years ago when they were the first of many to go on strike for low pay and bad benefits.
* **Rebuilding West Virginia’s economy - **West Virginia’s economy is suffering and we deserve a Governor that will prioritize rebuilding our economy through job creation.
* **Union Strong - **I stand with our labor unions and will fight for working families. This includes joining the fight to preserve our UMWA coal miners pensions.

Those are my goals. But reaching those goals won’t be easy. West Virginia’s current Governor Jim Justice is known as a “deadbeat billionaire”. **And he’s going to do everything he can to keep his seat not because he wants to help West Virginians but because he wants to keep his power and influence and enrich himself. **
Jim was elected as a Democrat and then 6 months after getting elected, switched his party affiliation to Republican and has been tricking West Virginians ever since. Whether it be fighting against our teachers, not paying his taxes or only working to benefit his own personal businesses, Jim Justice only cares about one person and that is himself.

**[Your $20 contribution to our campaign would help us prepare for what is coming with Jim.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11656445/118936235/-690639319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWE0MmJmNC0zMjAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_GfAgBP3O6k3jcfGAcOu3pqGw_rWcNrLhkqXIEk53k=) **

Through our campaign, we are going to bring West Virginians together from all walks of life, all sides of the political spectrum and all beliefs and values. Like Matt Bevin in Kentucky, Jim isn’t the most popular guy but he does have the personal wealth to take on anyone. That’s why I need your help.
Combatting a deadbeat billionaire’s billions will not be easy. But if we can do it in Kentucky against Bevin and his political machine, then I know we can do it in West Virginia. That is why your contribution could be so important. I hope you’ll join us.

**[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em1106](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11656446/118936236/-690639319?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWE0MmJmNC0zMjAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_GfAgBP3O6k3jcfGAcOu3pqGw_rWcNrLhkqXIEk53k=)**

No one will be able to stand a chance against Jim Justice if we don’t stand together. I need you in this with me**. **

Let's** ** GO FORWARD
Ben** ** Salango

Ben Salango for West Virginia
PO Box 11650
Charleston, WV 25339
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/a49fc9d0-3102-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/8ea42bf4-3202-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODgzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4ZWE0MmJmNC0zMjAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=P_GfAgBP3O6k3jcfGAcOu3pqGw_rWcNrLhkqXIEk53k=&id=101419885&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com).

subject: Peter, checking back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Finello for Congress |
body:
After writing you twice yesterday, dozens of folks really stepped up. But Peter, we’re STILL short \-- and I haven’t seen a gift from you yet. (Sorry if you have given and I missed it, sometimes our systems are slow. If you did: THANK YOU!!) Please, we’re SO close now. We can win. Hillary Clinton, Gov. Wolf, and Sen. Casey all won this seat \-- and I’ll put in the work to win here, too. But my opponent is deep in the pocket of corporate PACs and big GOP donors, and I can only fight his PAC dollars with your support. I’m asking you personally to donate so I can make up the last $489 I need before midnight.

I wouldn’t be writing if this weren’t so important to me. subject: Thank You
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr Manny for U
body:

| |
---|---|---
| Peter - We’re so glad to have you on our team for U.S. Senate! As a political outsider, I’m not counting on the Washington establishment to win. I’m relying on the hard-working people of Tennessee like you. Together, I know that we can bring meaningful, conservative reform to Washington. This won’t be easy. But as an orthopedic trauma surgeon, I’m used to taking on tough challenges, executing under pressure, and delivering results. And we could definitely use more people in Washington with that type of experience. But I need your help to get the job done. Here is how you can help our efforts today:
1. Follow us on [**Facebook**](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-ekljhu-uunkhiuw-p/) and **[Twitter](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-ekljhu-uunkhiuw-x/)** to stay up to date with our campaign
2. Tell your friends and family why you want to send a Christian conservative and political outsider to the Senate
3. [**Pitch in $15**](https://mannysethi.cmail20.com/t/r-l-ekljhu-uunkhiuw-m/)to help us spread our message across Tennessee

Thank you in advance for any help you can make today and look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail soon. \- Dr. Manny |

I’m relying on the hard-working people of Tennessee like you. Together, I know that we can bring meaningful, conservative reform to Washington. This won’t be easy. But as an orthopedic trauma surgeon, I’m used to taking on tough challenges, executing under pressure, and delivering results. And we could definitely use more people in Washington with that type of experience. But I need your help to get the job done. Here is how you can help our efforts today: 1. Follow us on and to stay up to date with our campaign 2. Tell your friends and family why you want to send a Christian conservative and political outsider to the Senate 3. help us spread our message across Tennessee Thank you in advance for any help you can make today and look forward to seeing you on the campaign trail soon. \- Dr. Manny | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | Paid for by Dr Manny for U.S. Senate | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | |

body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11661867/118980655/683764388?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjNjYzU4MC00NDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YWdkW8NaLF9iQoVv-5gfDVHlIJnNEDYbInM-AYxZeMw=&emci=753cc580-4402-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=763cc580-4402-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=6233172)
---
Peter, **The people of this district have given me so much hope.**

Yesterday, I was out knocking doors in the rain here in Austin. Sometimes I think about why I get out there and do this hard work to get elected — it's because of the stories I hear while I am out. I hear how good healthcare programs save people's lives. I hear how people are working two and three jobs just to support their families and make sure their kids have a chance at success. I hear from people who are scared for the future of their kids and grandkids because of the threats of climate change and gun violence. But, I also hear hope. Hope that we can pull together and fight for each other.

That is why I am runnning for Congress. I’ve spent 20 years in the classroom and the courtroom, fighting to give everyone a fair shot at success. I am not relying on corporate PAC money or lobbyist contributions — I rely on you. This is a campaign for the people, by the people. And we need your help.

**[I am asking you to join our people-powered #10forTX10 campaign. Be a part of the movement and set up your recurring donation today!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11661868/118980656/53927620?refcode=em110819&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjNjYzU4MC00NDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YWdkW8NaLF9iQoVv-5gfDVHlIJnNEDYbInM-AYxZeMw=)**

Setting up a $10 recurring donation to our campaign now will help us run a strong campaign to replace Michael McCaul. We have just under four months left until the election but your recurring donation can help us plan right through election day. We did an amazing thing last election. We turned this "solid red" district into a national battleground, and with your support—and the support of countless more—we will finish the job! **[Help me give McCaul the gift of an early retirement. Set up your monthly recurring donation today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11661870/118980658/53927620?refcode=em110819&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NjNjYzU4MC00NDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=YWdkW8NaLF9iQoVv-5gfDVHlIJnNEDYbInM-AYxZeMw=)** For the people,
Mike Siegel

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: We The People...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
We The People...is US.
We the People, not We The Party...
We the People, not We the Wealthy only...
We the People, not WE the Powerful...
The founders of this nation built a system of governance in which the utmost power lies with THE PEOPLE. The elected officials in this system are charged with representing the best interests of THE PEOPLE, not for their own personal gain.
I got into this campaign because the best interests of THE PEOPLE are being ignored and taken for granted. Tax dollars are being wasted on walls and blatant corruption rises to the highest office in the land, while investment withers in important areas like education, the economy, the environment, and infrastructure.
One reason for this devolution is the lack of participation in elections. For example, did you know that the winner of the 2012 presidential election received 65.9 million votes, yet the winner of the 2016 presidential election received only 62.9 million votes? Your vote is your voice and your POWER. In 2016, THE PEOPLE did not fully exercise their right to POWER. We are going to change that!
This election is more about the voice of the voters than any in recent memory. When billionaires back my primary opponent, thanks to out of state politicians, your choice for who represents you in YOUR state of North Carolina is marginalized and muted. Do not let anyone take away your POWER.
To retain your POWER, spread the word about this campaign, get involved with us with volunteerism and grassroots engagement, encourage others to [sign up to receive our mailings and updates,](https://act.myngp.com/el/HD8NoXflTtyUyzNHcAT5S6M03qsX0I6ou66sVTJ55hw=/PKVuEV0ZU2Gf8e7Sq6qDS7o16QUx8EUWNbPD9vSNKxo=) direct your friends to our social media, and [donate what you can](https://act.myngp.com/el/HD8NoXflTtyUyzNHcAT5S6M03qsX0I6ou66sVTJ55hw=/AXilwoeJ_pyPh_ns04HpMObIYbe3ZocrqNBMhu1oGho=) to support our cause.
We will not cede this Senate seat to anyone but the citizens of North Carolina. We believe strongly in our campaign and we need you to exercise your right to POWER to make it a reality.
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HD8NoXflTtyUyzNHcAT5S6M03qsX0I6ou66sVTJ55hw=/AXilwoeJ_pyPh_ns04HpMObIYbe3ZocrqNBMhu1oGho=)

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HD8NoXflTtyUyzNHcAT5S6M03qsX0I6ou66sVTJ55hw=/AXilwoeJ_pyPh_ns04HpMObIYbe3ZocrqNBMhu1oGho=)
{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/HD8NoXflTtyUyzNHcAT5S6M03qsX0I6ou66sVTJ55hw=/rHLj6JTzyCJ71e5FF-JINEALD-Ej-d-qVIm2SONy63U=).

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/HD8NoXflTtyUyzNHcAT5S6M03qsX0I6ou66sVTJ55hw=/4eUhyorhuo_Bmr1DLSxd4MZZgFwrGp9e2hLBIbyt0S0=)

name: Joe Sestak
subject: Friday, November 8th - 8:40pm - Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak speaking at 2019 Presidential Forum on Environmental Justice in Orangeburg, South Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Peter,
I'm committed to furthering environmental justice by working with frontline communities to ensure equity in air, water, food and soil quality. This will include protecting natural eco-systems and more sustainable farming policies that provide healthier food with less environmental impact, as we reduce pollution and fight climate change that harms marginalized communities first and worst.
I'll be sharing my thoughts on these issues at the **2019 Presidential Forum on Environmental Justice at South Carolina State University in Orangeburg, South Carolina - hear me speak at 8:40pm Eastern on Friday, November 8th via livestream [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11666178/119008197/1327831542?emci=6475bbd5-d800-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTcyMzE5NS01MTAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lXNnG8IP8tFkaZGAy7C8AYXVoMqWiHFGdEELR_huVrU=).**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11666182/119008200/1327831542?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNTcyMzE5NS01MTAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lXNnG8IP8tFkaZGAy7C8AYXVoMqWiHFGdEELR_huVrU=&emci=6475bbd5-d800-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=05723195-5102-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=250798)
Warmest regards, Joe

name: Sasha
subject: Did you see Gary's email?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PETERS FOR MICHIGAN
body:
Hey, friends - Gary is hoping to get another 18 folks to sign our petition from Cresco, and we're missing your name.
Education is particularly important for Gary. His father, Herb, was an English teacher for 32 years. It's part of why Gary's speaking out against Betsy DeVos and Donald Trump.
**[Please, we're closing our petition soon: Will you add your name to tell the Trump Administration that Americans deserve an education secretary who will put students first?](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/secretaryofeducation2019?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgp-devos%3Fcode%3Djtk127-ja-nd")**

- Sasha Greer
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Gary Peters
Date: Sat, Nov 02, 2019
Subject: three years of Betsy DeVos
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa26/5721a3ed/71067a2d/efa8dd5/1804964598/VEsE/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
[](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa26/5721a3ed/71067a2d/efa8dd5/1804964598/VEsF/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petersformichigan.com/")
Friends,
It seems fairly straightforward that a secretary of education should put students first. But nearly three years into Betsy DeVos' tenure, she continues to put the interests of corporations ahead of our nation's students.
Just last week, a judge fined Secretary DeVos and her Department of Education $100,000 for violating a court order that she cease collecting on borrowers of student loans for a now-defunct for-profit college.
This isn't the first time Betsy DeVos has let for-profit colleges get away with pulling a fast one on students - and she'll continue her reckless behavior until she is removed as secretary of education. **We can't let her actions go unchecked, and that's why I need your help:**
**[Will you sign my petition declaring the American people deserve a secretary of education who will put our students first? I'm hoping to gather another 275 signatures before midnight, and I'm missing your name:](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/secretaryofeducation2019?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgp-devos%3Fcode%3Djtk127-ja-nd")**
| [Sign the Petition](https://secure.petersformichigan.?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://petitions.signforgood.com/secretaryofeducation2019?firstName=&lastName=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=3&amounts=3,25,50,100,250,500&code=peters&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgp-devos%3Fcode%3Djtk127-ja-nd")
---
The American people deserve a secretary of education who actually looks after our students. We can't stop speaking out until that happens. Thank you for adding your name.
Gary

Peters for Michigan
Po Box 32072
Detroit, MI 48244
Senator Gary Peters stands up for middle-class families in Michigan and across America every day. He is fighting for quality education, increasing job growth and protecting our values. Gary is working hard to stand up to the extreme Trump agenda and turn the Senate blue, and the path to taking back Congress runs right through Michigan. Join Gary's team and show your support [here.](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa26/5721a3ed/71067a2d/efa8dd3/1804964598/VEsB/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiImcmVjdXJyaW5nPTEifQ%3D%3D/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/peters_email?refcode=email-footer&recurring=1")

However, if you'd still like to receive fewer emails, you can click [here](https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/m/7b6daa26/5721a3ed/71067a2d/efa8dd1/1804964598/VEsP/?g=SkKTSlNw52hcsC2e00JiNrA "https://secure.petersformichigan.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). name: Sara Gideon
subject: Jeff Sessions just announced he is challenging Doug Jones for U.S. Senate in Alabama.
body:
Here's why I ask:
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cf6/4bef7a87/6b171d6d/287fce3f/1257635838/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
This might seem like an odd request coming from me (I have my own campaign to run!) but today, I'm asking you to support Doug Jones's reelection campaign.
**You see, Jeff Sessions just announced he is challenging Doug Jones for U.S. Senate in Alabama.**
This news should matter to all of us because if Democrats want to take back the Senate in 2020, we can't afford to lose in Alabama. We have to defend the seats we already have in order to make progress towards the majority.
And when I defeat Susan Collins next year, I'll need people like Doug Jones by my side in the Senate, fighting for our shared progressive ideals. That's why I'm asking you personally:
[**Split a $3 contribution between our campaigns today to help defend Doug Jones 's seat, win in Maine, and flip the Senate for Democrats. **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cf6/4bef7a87/6b171d6d/287fce3e/1257635838/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDgtYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jones?refcode=em191108-a")
Let me remind you what we're up against here: Jeff Sessions was once nominated for a position as a federal judge in 1986 and was not confirmed because he was considered too far-right and controversial, _even then._
He once joked that the Ku Klux Klan was "okay until he learned that they smoked marijuana."
And most recently, he served as Donald Trump's Attorney General and defended the administration's family separation policy.
We can't let Jeff Sessions win this Senate race so please, split a contribution right away. You can use this link:
**[Act.SaraGideon.com/DougJones](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cf6/4bef7a87/6b171d6d/287fce3e/1257635838/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDgtYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jones?refcode=em191108-a")**
Thank you for being a part of the grassroots team that's going to flip the Senate. I know we can do this with your support.
All my best,
Sara
******[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cf6/4bef7a87/6b171d6d/287fce3e/1257635838/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDgtYSJ9/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-jones?refcode=em191108-a")******

* * *
Sara Gideon for Maine
PO Box 812
South Freeport, ME 04078

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important tool for our campaign, but if you'd like to stop receiving messages from the campaign **[you can unsubscribe here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cf6/4bef7a87/6b171d6d/287fce3d/1257635838/VEsD/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "http://act.saragideon.com/page/unsubscribe/")**. Our campaign doesn't accept corporate PAC money, so if you can make a contribution today, it'd mean a lot. **[Chip in here](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cf6/4bef7a87/6b171d6d/287fce3c/1257635838/VEsA/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_footer")**

name: Bill Olson
subject: 81 genders?!?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w

Hi Peter,

The Democrats sure do lecture a lot about science- except when it comes to gender. Am I right?

These days, they seem to think there are 81 genders. I don't understand this - are they mistaking "gender" for something else?

It sounds like the nut-job liberal base thinks that anything can be a gender. One day you can be a male, next day you can be a female, next day you can be an ostrich, the day after you can be a potato.

Normally, I don't concern myself with the insane rantings of lunatics. However, their insanity is now becoming policy - and it's hurting innocent people.

Darren Soto voted “YES” to the absurd notion that biological men should be allowed to participate in biological women’s sports.

Any sane person would know that it is incredibly unfair for biological women to be forced to compete with biological men! Goodness sakes, isn’t that why we separated the sports out to begin with?

It doesn’t take a biological ￼genius to explain that most men are created physically stronger than most women. It’s biology.￼￼￼ This fact￼ doesn’t make one better, or the other worse, it’s just reality.

Now you have Dem front-runner Elizabeth Warren pushing for taxpayers to pay for gender reassignment surgery for prisoners.

The Democrats have lost their minds- and Darren Soto seems to always be the first one off the cliff!

We are red-blooded Americans! Two genders, respect them, that is all. If it's good enough for God, it's good enough for me!

So let me tell you my common-sense plan:

1. I will support bills at the state level to make it a crime to inject gender-bending hormones into anyone under 18 years of age. I will also work to ban this practice on Federal installations and military bases.

2. I will support bills at the state-level that mandate that athletes in schools MUST compete against their biological birth gender.

3. I will sponsor a bill to prevent taxpayers from EVER paying for gender reassignment surgeries - ESPECIALLY to prisoners or youth!

I'm going to defeat Darren Soto

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w
, a liberal extremist who thinks remaking human biology is ok.

I need your help today - to replace Darren Soto, stop the radicals in Congress, and stop the kook left from imposing their radical social agenda on us! Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w

I need to raise

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w
more, to let the people of Central Florida know about Soto's liberal record. It's crazy and it's out of step with our community!

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w
of $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple?

The Democrats are going to lose next year- but only if we stand up and fight! It's up to us to save our country!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w

P.S. This is congressional seat we can win in the swing state of Florida. I must defeat this radical socialist Democrat. Please contribute now before the end of the month whatever you can afford.

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h.FgfTLwNV6OuRU&b=gCPW0W7nXH0sd3g3h8vX5w
No amount is too small. God bless you and thank you - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

5 Halifax Ct
Marlton NJ 08053
USA

name: Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
subject: John Berendt, Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil, and me -- Thursday, November 14
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Here's a unique opportunity.

Join John Berendt, best selling author of Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil and formerly with Esquire and New York Magazine, on Thursday, November 14th at 6:30pm. The reception for me is at his Upper West Side home, featured in Architectural Digest.

I will be leading a lively discussion about the important issues facing our country and telling stories from the campaign trail.

More details are below. To RSVP and/or contribute online, click here. To RSVP by email click here.

Warmly,
Joe

* * * * * * * * * * * * * * * *
In a time of uncertainty, with Twitter-fed presidential leadership, an economy on the brink of potential recession and a Nation fighting terrorism around the world, spend the evening with one of our Country's true leaders, and envision a bold future.

Join Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak
at a Fundraiser on Thursday, November 14
hosted by Amy and Ken Ferris, Carol and Mark Herman, Paul Scoles, Roger Smith, Megan Strub and Doug Manion, Sean Strub, Diana Wiener, Bob Worth

* Former 3-star Admiral; commander of aircraft carrier battle group
* Interacted with Presidents, Parliamentary Members, and leaders of Ministries
* President Clinton’s Director of Defense Policy; head of Navy’s Strategic Anti-Terrorism Unit
* PhD in Political Economy & Government and Masters in Public Administration from Harvard
* Former U.S. Congressman; Vice Chairman, Small Business Committee; most productive Congressperson in his class; saved over 800 homes from foreclosure
* Elected and re-elected (by 20 points) in a 2-1 Republican Congressional District
* Challenged former Republican Senator Arlen Specter and won the primary, after being 40 points down.

Joe is running to unite this country, convene the world under U.S. leadership, and to bring about pragmatic policies that move America forward and serve all Americans.

His presidential campaign launched on June 23 in Iowa. The editorial board of the Des Moines Register [https://www.desmoinesregister.com/story/opinion/editorials/2019/07/30/joe-sestak-impresses-experience-and-discipline-editorial/1826416001/] said, “[Joe] impresses with experience, smarts and discipline..." and The National Review called him [https://www.nationalreview.com/2019/08/joe-sestak-most-interesting-democrat-you-forgot-was-running/] “the most interesting Democrat” in the race. Joe has launched his TV ads and walked 'in our shoes' across New Hampshire , meeting people and discussing their challenges. His showing in the latest CNN poll clearly demonstrates these actions have resonated.

Come and learn more about Joe’s Plan for America [https://www.joesestak.com/plan-for-america/] , and the restoration of trust, unity and accountability.

Thursday, November 14 at 6:30 p.m.
at the Home of John Berendt
Pulitzer Prize Finalist for Midnight in the Garden of Good and Evil
135 W. 87th Street (between Amsterdam and Columbus)
New York, NY 10024

Requested Contribution Levels:
Sponsor: $2800 Patron: $1000
Supporter: $500 Friend: $250
To RSVP and/or contribute for this event, click here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/reception111419]
You can also contribute by bringing a check to the reception or by mailing
a check payable to “Joe Sestak for President” to Joe Sestak for President, PO Box 17246, Alexandria, VA 22302.
Questions or to RSVP (and contribute at the reception): Email reception@joesestak.com or call 610-757-5051

Paid for by Joe Sestak for President

Joe Sestak
P.O Box 17246
Alexandria, VA 22302
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/d737e93e-3402-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68/85c08209-5d02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NWMwODIwOS01ZDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-RqZsLyfKZLAX02Z95-XEF-3iTvcZjviVu5V1OSCyag=&id=100808079&emailAddress=dpwillis67%40gmail.com .

name: Elisa Cardnell
subject: How many people have to suffer before Congress takes action?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elisa Cardnell for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11669113/119040914/1785235803?refcode=header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDk1Zjc3NC01ZDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aWmDzWtDMhWvI0f5mYzmvNkarcXEuUvMmUz0ck-wro=)
Peter,
**Did you know that prescription drug prices in the United States are higher than almost anywhere else in the world?** It’s time for the people of Texas to stand up and demand lower prescription drug prices now!
We have an opportunity to put an end to sky-high prescription drug prices by demanding that Congress pass H.R. 3. **This bill will allow Medicare to directly negotiate with drug companies and make the negotiation results publicly available to all Americans. It also invests in innovation and creates a limit on out-of-pocket costs.**
[_**Sign this petition immediately to demand that Congress pass H.R. 3.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11669114/119040915/-277068481?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDk1Zjc3NC01ZDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aWmDzWtDMhWvI0f5mYzmvNkarcXEuUvMmUz0ck-wro=&emci=84c08209-5d02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=3095f774-5d02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
Peter, I’ve watched as the price of my asthma medicine has gone up over the past few years, and I’ve read horror stories about folks with diabetes being forced to ration their life-saving insulin. **These diseases don’t care if you’re Republican, Democrat, or Independent. We must implement commonsense policies to lower the costs of prescription drugs.**
[_**Sign here to tell Congress we will not allow pharmaceutical companies to take advantage of us any longer.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11669115/119040916/-277068481?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDk1Zjc3NC01ZDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aWmDzWtDMhWvI0f5mYzmvNkarcXEuUvMmUz0ck-wro=&emci=84c08209-5d02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=3095f774-5d02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)
As your Congresswoman in 2020, I will fight my heart out for you and protect Texans from these pharmaceutical companies that want to squeeze us for every last cent. Together, we can end corporate greed and unfair prices for the drugs we need.
Thank you for all that you do,
Elisa Cardnell
****[SIGN HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11669116/119040917/-277068481?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mzg2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDk1Zjc3NC01ZDAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0aWmDzWtDMhWvI0f5mYzmvNkarcXEuUvMmUz0ck-wro=&emci=84c08209-5d02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=3095f774-5d02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=8311474)****

name: Coach Tuberville
subject: Jeff Sessions? “Total disaster”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
We need common-sense & fresh ideas in Washington... and I need your help to keep up our momentum!
---
| | | | | | | |
---
| | | Peter,

I'm sure you've seen the news. Jeff Sessions, desperate to return to Washington, is jumping into our race for U.S. Senate.

_This is the LAST thing Alabama needs!_

President Trump has previously said that if he had one "do-over" as President, he would NOT have appointed Jeff Sessions as Attorney General. He's even called him a "total disaster" and "an embarrassment to Alabama."

_**[If you agree, rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 special contribution today!](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=d92578b7206d968ec1a41df66abaf6293954f1c7160c2e7c60cb54445ef31d6ee6bf9c31246498e338fa082bcf2e426ca41faa2d416d1f1b "If you agree, rush a $5, $10, $25, or $50 special contribution today!")**_

The career and establishment politicians have proven, for decades, that they can't get the job done for the American people.

**Jeff Sessions previously sat in this seat for 20 years... and what, exactly, did he ever accomplish?**

It's time for a conservative outsider who will have President Trump's back. We need someone with common-sense fighting for our values in the U.S. Senate.

That's why I'm running... and _**[I need YOUR help](http://click.email.tommyforsenate.com/?qs=d92578b7206d968e66c95f5988a9b7123a72cc09731baaad9bdc1c1d024cd1bc8c4df01632efd606d2fecc5d120dcc9b1868b3a92decd3bc "I need YOUR help")**_ now as failed career politician Jeff Sessions attempts to weasel his way back into the D.C. swamp.

\- Coach Tuberville

name: Eugene DePasquale
subject: We want to hear from you, friend
disclaimer_text: Paid for by DePasquale for PA 10
body:
Yesterday, I led a roundtable discussion at Millersville University on the challenges of skyrocketing college tuition costs and mounting student loan debt.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11671904/119062365/-515613030?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2VjZTFlNy02NjAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdj8Y_a9xvvIr607OwFA3MEmYKem55bCkBrsxtx6PVc=&emci=a023ce2c-5c02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=63ece1e7-6602-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249) Friends,

Yesterday, I led a roundtable discussion at Millersville University on the challenges of skyrocketing college tuition costs and mounting student loan debt.

Student loan debt has doubled in the United States over the past decade. **There is an estimated $1.5 trillion in outstanding student loan debt, and Pennsylvania ranks second in total student loan debt.** The average Pennsylvania student has an astonishing $35,000 in unpaid student loans.

This type of crippling debt can haunt graduates for decades, making it harder for them to start careers, raise a family, and save for retirement. The stories I heard yesterday from students and recent alumni at Millersville were extremely powerful.

[**We have numerous colleges and universities in PA, so I’d like to hear from you. Will you share your story about how the high cost of tuition and mounting student loan debt have affected you and your family?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11671905/119062366/-515613030?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2VjZTFlNy02NjAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdj8Y_a9xvvIr607OwFA3MEmYKem55bCkBrsxtx6PVc=&emci=a023ce2c-5c02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=63ece1e7-6602-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)
| **[Share your story](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11671906/119062367/-515613030?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2M2VjZTFlNy02NjAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=wdj8Y_a9xvvIr607OwFA3MEmYKem55bCkBrsxtx6PVc=&emci=a023ce2c-5c02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=63ece1e7-6602-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10203249)**
---

At the roundtable, we discussed possible solutions to this problem — like public service loan forgiveness, more transparency in the student loan process, and weeding out loan servicers who are bad actors. But ultimately addressing this will require our state and federal governments working together.

**When I’m in Congress, I’ll work with whoever is willing to join us in treating this crisis with the urgency it deserves.**

Thanks for sharing with us,
Eugene

name: Cory Booker
subject: November 8, 2016.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cory 2020
body:
| | |
---
| Friend, For just a moment, I want you to think back to how you felt three years ago tonight -- when Donald Trump was declared the next president of the United States. If you're like me, you never want to experience anything like that shock again. Each of us must devote ourselves right now to do what it takes to win in 2020. Since Trump got elected, he's divided our nation with hate and fear all while undermining working and middle-class people along the way -- refusing to condemn white supremacists in Charlottesville, attempting to ban Muslims from entering our country, implementing tax cuts for the ultra-rich, trying to take away health care protections from millions, putting kids in cages at our border, backing out of the landmark Paris climate agreement. The list goes on. We can't allow him to win a second term. **We need a leader that will not only stand up against hate but work to heal our country with courageous empathy and an unapologetically bold vision for our future.** That's why I'm running for president. I believe that we won't beat Donald Trump by sinking to his level. You can't beat hate with more hate. We beat Donald Trump by bringing people together and recognizing that we all share a common pain, and the only way to heal that pain is by working together to solve our country's biggest problems. This election cycle is a defining moment for our country. **Are we going to find common cause or are we going to be divided even further?** We can't afford to get this wrong. **[If you're with me, make a donation to my campaign right now. Let's beat Trump, and let's do it by rising up together.](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191108_CB_20191108-fr-CB-2016-actives_actives_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Thanks,
Cory [](https://act.corybooker.%3D/?g=IiwAaFH8x8VcsCn-MvZWseA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cory2020-em-decdebate?refcode=em_fr_20191108_CB_20191108-fr-CB-2016-actives_actives_contribbutton&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")
---

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Alabama abortion law blocked for now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Hello Peter, A federal judge blocked Alabama's pending near-total abortion ban that most certainly would have shuttered clinics and placed those seeking abortion in danger. However, the judge's blocking of the law is only while the case makes its way up the courts \-- meaning that there is still the possibility that it will become law if ultimately upheld. If that happens, other states would have the impetus and judicial backing to pass their own laws, severely curtailing abortion access in much of the country. With the Supreme Court reviewing a Louisiana case involving a restrictive abortion law nearly identical to a Texas law the court struck down in 2016, this future is much closer than it seems. Public opinion has remained steady in support of abortion \-- according to a recent study, 54 percent support it being legal in most or all cases, holding nearly the same since 2014. This same study found that support for abortion amongst Democrats has only grown since 2014, rising from 67 percent to 70 percent. We need to know what Democrats think about this race so we are ready for whatever the GOP throws at us in 2020: **Are you pro-choice?** [YES](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc43/6e9863e8/162fb4b9/1db09ff0/1868692157/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/51yVV1cx") [NO](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc43/6e9863e8/162fb4b9/1db09ff0/1868692157/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://s.surveyplanet.com/51yVV1cx") Thanks for your support, WDTO Team [DONATE](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc43/6e9863e8/162fb4b9/1db09ff7/1868692157/VEsF/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/when-democrats-turn-out-nd?refcode=OUT20191108a.ND-b&refcode2=HxZD6xod0XVgQTsfqsJK")
---

**[If you’re ready to cut to the chase and pledge your support to build this movement for Texas with me, add your name to say you're in>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672861/119076187/-861903395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjQzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI0NDI5NS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N56abfECXJ1tTC2svr07V5x66aKmOofj3H50XMe2_zI=&emci=cba540c7-f3a8-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=16244295-6c02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10552737)**
| | [I'm in! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672862/119076188/-861903395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjQzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI0NDI5NS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N56abfECXJ1tTC2svr07V5x66aKmOofj3H50XMe2_zI=&emci=cba540c7-f3a8-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=16244295-6c02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10552737)
---

While I have loved my service as a Houston City Council Member, and we have accomplished a tremendous amount — like the growth of the tech and innovation ecosystem, our Harvey recovery response, and empowerment of local neighborhoods and reinvestment in under-resourced communities — the time for change across the entire state of Texas is now. That is why I am running for the United States Senate.

Let me make one thing very clear: I am doing this because I love this great state and the people, and it is time for Texas to elect a leader that achieves real results for real people.

I am also running because I believe Texans have been underrepresented in the U.S. Senate for far too long. And I’m ready to do something about it. I’m hoping you will help me do it in a way it has never been done before.

This campaign is not based on me; it is based on you and addressing your needs and desires for your households and communities. We can only succeed by building a people-powered movement based on the heart and soul of the Lone Star state — and that means you.

Us.

**Together.**

Ours is a campaign that will not just be won by listening to one another, but by hearing each other. We will win because everyone on our team will have a seat at the table. Everyone will have a voice.

The truth is, there has been little accountability when it comes to delivering change for the American people in health care, the economy, job opportunities for the future, and so much more. We are here to change that.

We will do away with the tired politics of our past and forge a new path forward for all Texans — not just some.

And we will do it by introducing bold, inclusive ideas that come from all over the state. From folks who all want the same thing: quality, affordable health care; stronger infrastructure; and a leader who shows up to Washington every single day to fight for people back home.

**[That’s why I’m asking: are you with me, friend? If you are, sign on to be a founding member of our team today. There’s no doubt in my mind that we will be up against dark money, special interests, and a bottomless Republican-funded war chest set out to protect a seat they never earned to begin with.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672863/119076189/-861903395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjQzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI0NDI5NS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N56abfECXJ1tTC2svr07V5x66aKmOofj3H50XMe2_zI=&emci=cba540c7-f3a8-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=16244295-6c02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10552737)**
| [I'M IN! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672864/119076190/-861903395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjQzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNjI0NDI5NS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=N56abfECXJ1tTC2svr07V5x66aKmOofj3H50XMe2_zI=&emci=cba540c7-f3a8-e911-bcd0-281878391efb&emdi=16244295-6c02-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&ceid=10552737)
---

Our journey won’t be easy. The hours will be long, and we will have to work hard to cross the finish line in November of 2020.

But I promise you this: every day will be worth it. Because fighting for what’s right is always worth it. And we will do it together.

I can’t wait to get to work with you. Talk soon.

— Amanda K. Edwards
Candidate for United States Senate, 2020

Paid for by Amanda Edwards for Texas

| | | | Hi Peter,

* * *
**_IN THE DISTRICT_**
Right before Halloween, Dan hosted his annual Pumpkin Jamboree Parade down Archer Avenue. Dan had a great time handing out candy and loved seeing all the unique costumes!
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672895/119076360/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191108_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q4ZTBlMS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li5GMyLyX9B_D1Ku30Ex5RYvTGHkfloWl1WDx0esawo=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672897/119076362/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191108_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q4ZTBlMS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li5GMyLyX9B_D1Ku30Ex5RYvTGHkfloWl1WDx0esawo=)

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672900/119076365/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191108_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q4ZTBlMS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li5GMyLyX9B_D1Ku30Ex5RYvTGHkfloWl1WDx0esawo=)

Team Lipinski held a happy hour fundraiser at Metal Monkey Brewing in Romeoville with over 100 people joining! As a craft beer enthusiast, Dan loved talking with his supporters while enjoying a chocolate-peanut butter imperial stout. Special thanks to Mayors Noak, Egofske, Soliman, and Streit for hosting.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672901/119076366/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191108_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q4ZTBlMS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li5GMyLyX9B_D1Ku30Ex5RYvTGHkfloWl1WDx0esawo=)
* * *

The energy in the 19th Ward was palpable on Wednesday as Dan was in Beverly sharing his message with more than 75 voters. A special thank you to Del & Betsy Wilkins for hosting the congressman at their beautiful home in Beverly.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11672902/119076367/-1254616545?refcode=DL_EM_EN_90DO_191108_1_1&amount=10&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDg4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiY2Q4ZTBlMS02YzAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Li5GMyLyX9B_D1Ku30Ex5RYvTGHkfloWl1WDx0esawo=)
* * *
**_GET INVOLVED_**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: Jeff Sessions is running for Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado
body:
The difference between Doug Jones and Jeff Sessions couldn't be more clear. | | | [](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771478/691c9bd/6ff2bbc9/11a7f82d/3818959384/VEsH/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-nov?refcode=em_template")
---
| Friend,

It's official. Jeff Sessions is running for Senate in Alabama against Democrat Doug Jones.

Let's be clear: Jeff Sessions is an extremist and has no place back in the Senate.

I know we've been reaching out to you a lot lately for help, but it's because there is so much at stake. We need Doug Jones in the Senate--we can't take back the majority without him, and to be frank with you, it's going to be a really tough race.

**[Will you rush a split donation right now to defend Doug, and help flip the Senate blue?](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dougjones?refcode=em_fr_20191108_JH_20191108-fr-JH-jones-all_all_l1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")**

Jeff Sessions' record on civil rights is deeply disturbing. He voted against the Affordable Care Act, which would strip health care away from people with pre-existing conditions, every chance he got. And he oversaw the separation of children from their families as Trump's Attorney General.

And Doug? As a U.S. Attorney, he prosecuted members of the KKK for the 16th Street Baptist Church bombing. He's fighting for health care and equal rights, and he's working hard to make people's lives better.

The difference between Doug Jones and Jeff Sessions couldn't be more clear.

We need Senators who will work together to get things done. This week proved yet again that Democrats can win everywhere, if we organize and show up. And a huge part of that is having the resources to compete.

**Please split a contribution to Doug Jones' campaign and my campaign, and let 's make sure Jeff Sessions never sets foot in the Senate again.** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through right away._ [**_DONATE $5 NOW_**](https://secure.hickenlooper.?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hickenlooperforco-em-dougjones?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em_fr_20191108_JH_20191108-fr-JH-jones-all_all_expresslane5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=")
