Keep us company on the campaign trail by joining us on [_**Facebook**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771478/691c9bd/6ff2bbc9/11a7f823/3818959384/VEsHBA/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.facebook.com/JohnHickenlooper/"), [_**Twitter**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771478/691c9bd/6ff2bbc9/11a7f820/3818959384/VEsHBw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://twitter.com/hickenlooper"), [_**Instagram**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771478/691c9bd/6ff2bbc9/11a7f821/3818959384/VEsHBg/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.instagram.com/johnhickenlooper/"), and [_**YouTube**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771478/691c9bd/6ff2bbc9/11a7f85e/3818959384/VEsHAQ/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC82O0Byp_ny13O0LkO1UpUg/featured").
We love staying connected to you--and these emails are the best way to stay up to date with the latest on this campaign. But if at any point you'd like to stop receiving these messages, you can unsubscribe [here](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771478/691c9bd/6ff2bbc9/11a7f85f/3818959384/VEsHAA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com").
If we're not reaching you at the correct email address, please update your information [_**here**_](https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/m/63771478/691c9bd/6ff2bbc9/11a7f822/3818959384/VEsHAw/?g=Wvb-QcQot1BcsCb456pUfvA "https://secure.hickenlooper.com/page/s/sign-up?source=em_footer").
clean_body: The difference between Doug Jones and Jeff Sessions couldn't be more clear. | | | "" | Friend, It's official. Jeff Sessions is running for Senate in Alabama against Democrat Doug Jones. Let's be clear: Jeff Sessions is an extremist and has no place back in the Senate. I know we've been reaching out to you a lot lately for help, but it's because there is so much at stake. We need Doug Jones in the Senate--we can't take back the majority without him, and to be frank with you, it's going to be a really tough race. "=" Jeff Sessions' record on civil rights is deeply disturbing. He voted against the Affordable Care Act, which would strip health care away from people with pre-existing conditions, every chance he got. And he oversaw the separation of children from their families as Trump's Attorney General. And Doug? As a U.S. Attorney, he prosecuted members of the KKK for the 16th Street Baptist Church bombing. He's fighting for health care and equal rights, and he's working hard to make people's lives better. The difference between Doug Jones and Jeff Sessions couldn't be more clear. We need Senators who will work together to get things done. This week proved yet again that Democrats can win everywhere, if we organize and show up. And a huge part of that is having the resources to compete. Please split a contribution to Doug Jones' campaign and my campaign, and let 's make sure Jeff Sessions never sets foot in the Senate again. name: Tina Smith
subject: Keep Jeff Sessions out of the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
If we're going to take back the Senate, we need to help Doug Jones hold his seat. Will you help Doug and me take on our Republican opponents and flip the Senate?

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-jones-email?refcode=em191108jones-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=") Friend, Doug Jones needs our help.

Jeff Sessions just announced that he's running for the Senate in 2020. Sessions is one of the reasons Washington is so dysfunctional right now. And we can't have him in the Senate.

Putting extreme right-wing Senate candidates on the ballot in 2020 is all a part of the Republicans' plan. _The Washington Post_ has reported that part of the Republicans' strategy to hold their Senate majority is to try to flip Alabama and Minnesota.

Both Doug and I are facing extreme right-wing opponents, which puts our seats in jeopardy in this election.

**We do not want Jeff Sessions or Jason Lewis or another polarizing figure in Washington -- we need people that are ready to come together. That's why we need to do everything we can to keep Sessions and Lewis out.**

**[We need to come together to stand up for our progressive values and move our country forward. Chip in $10 now and we'll split your donation between both of our campaigns.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-jones-email?refcode=em191108jones-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$10 »](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc40595/c1f7015/66d7f8ef/114520f7/7399821/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoidHNtLWpvbmVzLWVtYWlsIiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbTE5MTEwOGpvbmVzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-jones-email?refcode=em191108jones-full-exp&express_lane=true&amount=10")

This election is about more than just one seat. It's about how we're putting everything we've got into flipping the Senate to protect health care, save the Supreme Court, and address the climate change crisis.

**If Doug Jones and I can hold our Senate seats, then we can take back the Senate in 2020. But in order to do that, we need everyone to come together and stand up to our Republican opponents. Will you join us?**

**[Chip in $10 now and let's save the Senate.](https://action.tinaforminnesota.%3D%3D/?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-jones-email?refcode=em191108jones-full&recurring=auto&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thanks for your help,

Tina
**U.S. Senator Tina Smith is running for re-election in 2020 in a race _NBC News_ has already labeled a "race to watch" with Donald Trump targeting Minnesota for victory. Make sure she has the resources to fight back.** [CONTRIBUTE](https://action.tinaforminnesota.?g=YCjTcDpTVzRarKyUt8_RZpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tsm-jones-email?refcode=em191108jones-full-biobox&amount=10&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&firstname=188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=PA&phone=&employer=&occupation=&recurring=auto")

name: Senator Erica Smith
subject: Every Day is Veterans Day
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica for US
body:
Dear Supporter,
Every Day is Veterans Day for Many Americans
As we go into the Veterans Day Weekend, we are reminded of the appreciation we have for the commitment, dedication, and sacrifices made by members of military and their families. For these members of the military and their families, every day is a day of service to our nation. We appreciate and honor their outstanding service to our nation and for our safety and security around the world.
Being born in Fort Bragg, raised as the daughter of an Air Force officer, and as an employee at Boeing who helped design and develop some of the most advanced military weapons of war, I have the utmost respect for these courageous military men and women who serve our nation so well.
Veterans Day is more than just one day a year. It is every day in the hearts of many Americans.

[](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGea6lE30XSlUZFRMOqJdK_yNH-ryXai1eAS3E0vqRc=/XrABxHfaQhcIcH6dZM_rqi_KXMe55IxmKakPUDpM88E=)
{{Authorized and Paid for by Erica for US .}}
{{Erica For US P.O. Box 1236 Gaston, North Carolina 27832}}
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/BGea6lE30XSlUZFRMOqJdK_yNH-ryXai1eAS3E0vqRc=/SLC2nYYmKG-aTAbOUn3RSgKb8GBP3TeZvrt2T_myYF8=).

name: Jay Inslee
subject: Add your name: Call on 2020 Democratic presidential candidates to take up my climate plan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
This is a winning message -- and it's ready-made for them.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&utm_campaign=prez-can-signon&utm_medium=ema&t=3&akid=7982%2E868730%2ESG0tG3) Friend, In one year, our country could look very different -- or it could get even worse. This week next year, Americans will cast their ballots, and there are essentially two outcomes: Either we elect a Democrat as our next president and mobilize the power of the United States to create a clean energy economy -- _or_ we have another four years of Donald Trump's campaign of climate denialism and environmental degradation, and we descend further into climate chaos. If you care about the world that our kids will inherit, there is nothing more critical than beating Donald Trump. But that's not good enough. We must demand more than a "win" -- we must demand that the next president take bold action to defeat the climate crisis. Anything less will spell disaster. **So my question to all the candidates is this: If elected, will you adopt my climate plan and put the United States on the path to defeating climate change?** [**I'm calling on all the 2020 candidates to sign onto my plan to build a clean energy economy, create 8 million new jobs, and ensure our children and grandchildren grow up with clean air and clean water: Add your name to join me.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&utm_campaign=prez-can-signon&utm_medium=ema&t=4&akid=7982%2E868730%2ESG0tG3) | [ADD YOUR NAME!](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&utm_campaign=prez-can-signon&utm_medium=ema&t=5&akid=7982%2E868730%2ESG0tG3)
---
We can't let President Trump continue to lie and say that climate action means killing American jobs -- the fact is, defeating climate change _is_ a jobs message and will create millions of new jobs across America.
We're already showing the world that climate action is a jobs message here in Washington state, where I just dedicated one of the biggest biofuel refinery operations in the country. And where I recently visited the largest manufacturer of solar panels in North America. These are real jobs -- and this is a message you can argue across the Midwest and up and down the coasts.
Clean energy jobs are growing twice as fast as the average economy. And this is a message that resonates -- so I think this is a winner in every county, every zip code._I know that a progressive climate change message is how we win -- and it's how we save our planet._
Look, this is a big mountain to climb -- but we can't be paralyzed by the task. November 2020 is the next rock to grab in this climb, and Democrats need to win the presidency. How do they do that? By signing onto my climate plans and proving to voters that they're ready to step up to the plate and save our planet.
[**Join me in calling on the 2020 Democratic presidential candidates to take up my climate plan, commit to reversing the devastating effects of Donald Trump's presidency, and put American jobs and ingenuity first in ending climate change for good.**](https://act.jayinslee.com/sign/pres-candidates/?utm_source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&source=ema_2019-11-07_prez-can-signon&utm_campaign=prez-can-signon&utm_medium=ema&t=6&akid=7982%2E868730%2ESG0tG3)
Very truly yours,
Jay

name: Team Ed Markey
subject: It's a revolution
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Markey Committee
body:
| |
---
| Team:

We're up against our first end-of-week deadline in November, and right now, we're only 77% of the way to raising our $25,000 goal.

_**[Will you chip in $27 or more to stand with Ed Markey?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-110819_1&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

This Sunday, Ed is participating in the Massachusetts Climate Debate. In this Democratic primary, Ed believes you have the right to know how your U.S. Senate candidates will combat the climate crisis.

Ed knows the best way to address this planetary crisis is with a Green New Deal.

**The Green New Deal _is more than a resolution -- it's a revolution_.** More people are talking about and engaging on climate change than ever before.

➜ 63% of adults think the Green New Deal is a good idea.

➜ 60% of registered voters support it, including 86% of Democrats and 64% of independents.

While President Trump and the GOP bury their heads in the sand and deny climate change, Ed is leading a grassroots movement forward to save our planet and grow our economy.

But if we don't have the resources to keep Ed in this fight, we'll be allowing the naysayers and climate deniers to win and put our planet in peril.

_**[Will you stand with Ed today to help us reach this week's goal? name: =?utf-8?Q?Renee=20Unterman?=
subject: Hello from the Campaign Trail!
body:
| |
---
| | |
---
|
Friends,

Let me begin by thanking each of you – I'm overwhelmed by the support I've received so far. I'm working hard to reach and hear from every voter in Georgia’s 7th Congressional District before the Republican Primary on Tuesday, May 19th.

I’ve proven I can do more than talk about conservative values – I've gotten results on the kitchen table issues that improve the lives of Georgians I represent. As a lifelong member of this community, I share the values of my neighbors, and I have a record of FIGHTING and WINNING for them.
---
|
---
| I've been working hard to share my conservative message with voters across the 7th District. I’ve met with business owners, healthcare professionals, law enforcement officers, educators, community leaders and more. But I need YOUR help to keep up the momentum!

Our grassroots campaign relies on the support of Georgians like YOU, and I cannot do this without your help. **I am asking my top supporters to please do the following:**
1. **Donate **[online](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=56260b7a93&e=c1dbff800f) – any amount helps!
2. **Like** our [Facebook](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=63edaba98f&e=c1dbff800f) page, and follow us on [Twitter](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=23e9a73334&e=c1dbff800f) and [Instagram](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=1f82868062&e=c1dbff800f).
3. **Share** campaign social media posts online with your friends and family.
4. **[Volunteer](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=b96733e350&e=c1dbff800f)** on our website to make phone calls, canvass your neighborhood, host a meet & greet, or attend a community event!

---
|
---
| Next, I’d like to introduce two individuals that have been hard at work for Team Renee:

Brendan Jaspers, Campaign Manager
[Brendan@reneeunterman.org](mailto:Brendan@ReneeUnterman.org)

Lyndy Saparow, Finance Director
[Lyndy@reneeunterman.org](mailto:Lyndy@ReneeUnterman.org)

Brendan and Lyndy bring with them the experience and determination it will take to win in November, and I am so excited to have them in the trenches with me as we fight to keep the 7th District RED!
---
|
---
| I am so thankful to have your support in this journey. Together, we will keep radical socialism out of Forsyth and Gwinnett Counties, and we will defend the conservative values that make our community strong. Stay tuned for more updates from the campaign trail!

Now, let's go win this thing!

-Renee
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=433eabb405&e=c1dbff800f)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=0d16398dc7&e=c1dbff800f)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=99824af7bd&e=c1dbff800f)
---
| | [](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=1d04c904d5&e=c1dbff800f)
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2019 Unterman for Congress, All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

**Our mailing address is:**
Unterman for CongressPO Box 508Buford, GA 30515-0508
[Add us to your address book](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/vcard?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=cf87080e68)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/profile?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=cf87080e68&e=c1dbff800f) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://gmail.us3.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&id=cf87080e68&e=c1dbff800f&c=9489dcb12a).

[](http://www.mailchimp.com/monkey-rewards/?utm_source=freemium_newsletter&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=monkey_rewards&aid=60170c3a179cc01468053f87a&afl=1)

name: Joe Sestak
subject: REVISED TIME - Friday, November 8th - 8:15pm - Presidential Candidate Joe Sestak speaking at 2019 Presidential Forum on Environmental Justice in Orangeburg, South Carolina
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Joe Sestak for President
body:
Good evening,
**My speaking time has changed - I will now be speaking at the 2019 Presidential Forum on Environmental Justice at South Carolina State University at 8:15pm Eastern tonight. You can watch me via livestream [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/11674569/119093336/1327831542?emci=6475bbd5-d800-ea11-828b-2818784d6d68&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS83NTY5NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZTY3NDQ5OC03YTAyLWVhMTEtODI4Yi0yODE4Nzg0ZDZkNjgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=s2m27ywFpsVZHnChwttB7gNHc0w9X8Vfd7TLiSyUMYU=). **More information below.

Friend,
As 2020 comes roaring at us, one thing is for sure: America’s conversation about politics – specifically President Trump – will keep partisan lines hardening all across the country.

Liberal activists will only get _more_ fired up, and Nancy Pelosi’s mega-donors from the two coasts will pour even _more_ money into Texas.

That’s why when Sen. John Cornyn asked if I’d reach out to explain how important his campaign’s efforts are to keeping Texas red! He needs our help and I hope you’ll join me in giving him every bit of assistance we can. He leads our state ticket and so much is riding on him having a strong and effective campaign that turns our every Republican and conservative voter in Texas.

Earlier this year, the Cornyn campaign set lofty goals for “Total 2019 Supporters,” and right now, they’re short of their goal.

So as the clock winds down on 2019, **[I’ve teamed up with Sen. Cornyn’s campaign to help them identify exactly who they must have aboard in order to meet their 2019 Supporter Goal. name: Michael Bennet
subject: We can cut childhood poverty by nearly half immediately
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bennet for America
body:
but we can't do it without you! | |
---
| Team -

I'm running for president because I give a damn about the future of America's kids.

The current state of childhood poverty in the United States is abhorrent and shameful.

[I refuse to continue the repugnant cycle of negligence toward poor children.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1f/134673f2/a636275/6997c342/2358139073/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_child_poverty_survey?source=EM_PET_B1_110819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[I have a plan that would cut childhood poverty by 40% immediately and end it in a generation, without adding a single bureaucrat to the government. Will you join me? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1f/134673f2/a636275/6997c342/2358139073/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_child_poverty_survey?source=EM_PET_B1_110819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1f/134673f2/a636275/6997c342/2358139073/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_child_poverty_survey?source=EM_PET_B1_110819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")
Donald Trump has used his time in office to give massive tax breaks to the ultra wealthy, while selling out the next generation.

[If you elect me, I will make America's kids a priority.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1f/134673f2/a636275/6997c342/2358139073/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_child_poverty_survey?source=EM_PET_B1_110819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

_But I won 't stop there, team._

We're going to raise the minimum wage to $15, provide free universal preschool, expand support for child nutrition programs such as WIC and food stamps, and fully fund housing vouchers for those who qualify in order to reduce homelessness.

[Finally, I will pass the American Family Act, which will provide a Child Tax Credit of up to $300 per month per child to help working families afford to raise their kids and cut child poverty by nearly 40% immediately and end it in a generation.](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1f/134673f2/a636275/6997c342/2358139073/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_child_poverty_survey?source=EM_PET_B1_110819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

[Team, it's time we break the repugnant cycle of negligence toward poor children. I need your help. Will you join me? >>](https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/m/35cbae1f/134673f2/a636275/6997c342/2358139073/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVkdhWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIn0%3D/?g=GUSlGlH8x8Vcy9-bgCeB4mA "https://secure.michaelbennet.com/page/s/end_child_poverty_survey?source=EM_PET_B1_110819_AC_ND&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=")

This issue is critical to our nation's future. Thank you for joining the fight.

Michael

subject: [URGENT] recall campaign launched against me

body:
**In case you have not yet seen the news, a fringe group has launched an effort to recall me from office over my votes in the House of Representatives to protect the integrity of our Democracy.**

**Let me be very clear, I will not be intimidated out of doing what is right for our country by a recall campaign.**

I am proud of my record in Congress and I remain steadfastly committed to protecting our country and serving the needs of the people of Arizona's Ninth District.

_With that said, I need your urgent help to raise the resources I will need to fight back against this sham recall campaign! _

name: Team Lewis
subject: Smith in freefall?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Lewis for Senate
body:
Did you hear about the latest polling numbers from Morning Consult? The news is NOT good for Tina Smith!
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/1ad7f443d727b135/e7b30827070ee5efc3d6b838967d376c/33183) Fellow Conservative, Did you hear about the latest polling numbers from _Morning Consult_? The news is NOT good for Tina Smith: 1) 58% of Minnesota voters have either never heard of Tina Smith or DISAPPROVE of her job performance; 2) She is the ONLY vulnerable Democrat to see a DECLINE in her net approval number in the 3rd quarter! From a write-up on FiveThirtyEight: _“Of the Democrats in currently competitive contests (that is, those not rated as ‘safe’ for either party), only Minnesota Sen. Tina Smith saw a decline in her net approval... ”_ It’s no coincidence that these numbers come during the same quarter that Jason launched his campaign. He’s been calling out her radical true colors, including her opposition to jobs and opportunity in the areas of Minnesota that need help the most. _**Jason’s messaging is resonating with voters... and we can’t let up!**_ Help FIRE Tina Smith on November 3, 2020. As President Trump said, she’s a ‘do-nothing’ U.S. Senator who does not represent our values. Every dollar we raise will help us reach 7 more voters. **[Please make a $5, $10, $25, or $50 contribution today, or more if you can](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/1ad7f443d727b135/5e717f4214a7e60cc3d6b838967d376c/33183).** Tina Smith is vulnerable. We know it... but the Democrats know it too. They’re going to rush in massive out-of-state campaign cash to prop her up. We must be prepared to fight back, united as Minnesota conservatives ready to make history. **[Chip in today to help TAKE BACK Minnesota in 2020!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/1ad7f443d727b135/7c95cd3d7c226743c3d6b838967d376c/33183)** \- Team Lewis id:2019-10-28-16:42:54:301t [ Stand with Jason HERE! >> ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/5b71fafb5ba1f9d636ff93d4ab7bd0b7/33183/1ad7f443d727b135/8033fcf1cee7b6aec3d6b838967d376c/33183) | |

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Offshore drilling has no place on our shores
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, While Democrats are focused on impeachment and voting Trump out in 2020, he's using every possible moment to cause as much damage as possible \-- especially with his environmental policies. Trump has gutted emissions standards, expanded logging and mining, and now, he wants to expand offshore drilling into the Atlantic. Expanding offshore drilling would be devastating to our environment and coastal economies, and the GOP knows it, but all they care about are corporate donations. They may not care about the future of our planet or the health of our children, but America does. Joe Cunningham, a Democrat, flipped an R+10 district in South Carolina in 2018 on a platform opposing offshore drilling with support from pro-environment Republicans. If everyone raises their voices and speaks out, it can cause real change. [**We need everyone who cares to tell the Trump administration that we will not let our shores, beaches, and town be polluted by oil just so they can get an extra dime in their pockets. If you agree, you 've got to make your voice heard today -- you can make a difference.**](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc1b/6e9863e8/1629e3a9/1db099fc/2482035219/VEsH/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/wdtop/") Thank you, The WDTO Team [ADD YOUR NAME](https://turnoutpac.bsd.net/page/m/78bcdc1b/6e9863e8/1629e3a9/1db099fc/2482035219/VEsE/?g=mj_BT60LBwxdW4nnt4whVXA "https://www.signherenow.org/petition/atlantic-offshore-drilling/wdtop/")

name: Nikki Foster
subject: It's inexcusable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
|
---
[ ](https://go.nikkifosteroh.com/page/m/7732cf01/30a4f917/506dd195/28ce339c/404153886/VEsH/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/fos_monthly_template?refcode=fos_header_logo&amount=25&recurring=auto&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1+-+%0D%0A%09%09%09%09%09%09%09&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_191108_GunViolence_U1_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_191108_GunViolence_U1_X1")

| | In 2019 alone, there have been more than 350 mass shootings in the United States. That's more than one per day. It's impossible for me not to worry about my sons, Henry and Wyatt. The anxiety follows them around, to their schools, to the mall, to the movie theater. name: Warren for President
subject: See how much these billionaires would pay under Elizabeth's wealth tax:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for President
body:
Lately, some billionaires seem to be confused about how much they'd pay under Elizabeth's wealth tax. So we thought we'd help them do the math. | | | [](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528fe0/45c30650/1076a377d/66f5eed4/2408611852/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Lately, some billionaires seem to be confused about how much they'd pay under Elizabeth's wealth tax.

So we thought we'd help them do the math.

**Here's what some of the richest people in America would owe next year:**
* Michael Bloomberg -- worth $52 billion -- would pay $3.079 billion
* Jeff Bezos -- worth $112.3 billion -- would pay $6.697 billion
* Bill Gates -- worth $107 billion -- would pay $6.379 billion
* Mark Zuckerberg -- worth $71.5 billion -- would pay $4.249 billion
* Betsy DeVos's family -- worth $5.4 billion -- would pay $283 million

Here's the thing: The whole point of Elizabeth's plan for a wealth tax is to make it possible for _everyone_ -- not just the billionaires -- to have a chance to succeed.

With that money from those billionaires, and from 75,000 of the richest families in the country, we will be able to invest in education from birth through college, including...
* Universal Child Care and universal pre-K for every baby in this country aged zero to five
* Raising the wages of every child care worker in America
* Adequate and equitable funding for public schools so every child can get a great public education
* Universal free public college and technical schools
* Investing at least $50 billion in Historically Black Colleges and Universities and Minority-Serving Institutions
* Canceling student loan debt for 95% of the borrowers who have it

**The people who've made it big will be able to contribute back to the society that helped them succeed.

They'll be able to chip in to help make sure the next kid is able to succeed, too.**

**[And if you can chip in to help make sure we win in 2020 and pass this wealth tax in 2021, please make a donation today.](https://my.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/28528fe0/45c30650/1076a377d/66f5eed7/2408611852/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LW5vdjE5ZnIiLCJlM3NnY21WbVkyOWtaU0I5ZlE9PSI6IkVNTDM0Rl9FR1JfTkZGX1BfMjAxOTExMDhfVjFTM19QX1QxIn0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-nov19fr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EML34F_EGR_NFF_P_20191108_V1S3_P_T1")**

clean_body: Lately, some billionaires seem to be confused about how much they'd pay under Elizabeth's wealth tax. So we thought we'd help them do the math. | | | "" Lately, some billionaires seem to be confused about how much they'd pay under Elizabeth's wealth tax. So we thought we'd help them do the math. Here's what some of the richest people in America would owe next year: Michael Bloomberg -- worth $52 billion -- would pay $3.079 billion Jeff Bezos -- worth $112.3 billion -- would pay $6.697 billion Bill Gates -- worth $107 billion -- would pay $6.379 billion Mark Zuckerberg -- worth $71.5 billion -- would pay $4.249 billion Betsy DeVos's family -- worth $5.4 billion -- would pay $283 million Here's the thing: The whole point of Elizabeth's plan for a wealth tax is to make it possible for everyone -- not just the billionaires -- to have a chance to succeed. With that money from those billionaires, and from 75,000 of the richest families in the country, we will be able to invest in education from birth through college, including... Universal Child Care and universal pre-K for every baby in this country aged zero to five Raising the wages of every child care worker in America Adequate and equitable funding for public schools so every child can get a great public education Universal free public college and technical schools Investing at least $50 billion in Historically Black Colleges and Universities and Minority-Serving Institutions Canceling student loan debt for 95% of the borrowers who have it The people who've made it big will be able to contribute back to the society that helped them succeed. They'll be able to chip in to help make sure the next kid is able to succeed, too. "" | If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | "" | "" | | "" | "" | | "" | "" Thanks, Team Warren P.S. Unless you have more than $50 million to your name -- making you one of the richest 0.1% of Americans -- you won't owe a single cent under this tax. If you have a net worth of exactly $50,000,001, you will owe exactly two cents on that dollar. Just two cents! Speaking of two cents... _And your name will be shown to President Trump before he takes off on Air Force One._**

[**So, what do you say, Peter? Will you add your name as one of President Trump’s top supporters right now?**](https://perduesenate.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4ebb829fcdaef555ddec2107e&id=e2a2e98476&e=02cd889ad3)

David Perdue

body:
He's trying to tip the scales.
# [](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfa/4bef7a87/6bea81f7/287fcff1/674156330/VEsH/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-email-template?refcode=em_header")

Friends,
Mitch McConnell and Senate Republicans are tweeting about Susan Collins:
[](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfa/4bef7a87/6bea81f7/287fcff0/674156330/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191108-2-b")
**They say she puts Mainers first, but in reality, she puts the needs of Mitch McConnell first.**
That's why McConnell is all in to help Susan Collins' campaign. He even hosted a high-dollar fundraiser for her and invited their wealthy donors and PACs who donated over _$10,000_ to Collins' reelection campaign.
He'll do (and spend!) anything to keep Collins' Senate seat for Republicans -- but there's no way we're going to let them win like that:
[**Rush a $3 contribution right away so we can take on Mitch McConnell and Susan Collins and WIN >>> **](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfa/4bef7a87/6bea81f7/287fcff0/674156330/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191108-2-b")****
This race is going to be incredibly close -- that's why McConnell is trying to tip the scales! But if we are willing to put in the hard work, we can defeat Susan Collins and take back the Senate for Democrats.
Are you with us?
_\- Team Sara_
********[CONTRIBUTE](https://gideon.bsd.net/page/m/65802cfa/4bef7a87/6bea81f7/287fcff0/674156330/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0xOTExMDgtMi1iIn0%3D/?g=siAzLVH8x8VdU6OjQM8XC0A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sg-november?refcode=em191108-2-b")********

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: FWD: A fellow Floridian is under attack!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Patriot,
Did you see Rep. Mast's note from earlier this week? He is a great friend and I truly appreciate his support. Unfortunately he is right, I am under constant attack from the liberal elites and the mainstream fake news media. | Team: Did you catch this email from earlier today? Ed is leading the grassroots movement to combat the climate crisis, and we need your urgent help.

_**[This Sunday, Ed will be participating in the Massachusetts Climate Debate, and we need to close on our $25,000 goal to show our grassroots strength. Can you pitch in $27 before midnight?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-110819_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

Begin Forward:
* * *
> Team:
>
> We're up against our first end-of-week deadline in November, and right now, we're only 77% of the way to raising our $25,000 goal.
>
> _**[Will you chip in $27 or more to stand with Ed Markey?](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-110819_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_
>
> This Sunday, Ed is participating in the Massachusetts Climate Debate. In this Democratic primary, Ed believes you have the right to know how your U.S. Senate candidates will combat the climate crisis.
>
> Ed knows the best way to address this planetary crisis is with a Green New Deal.
>
> **The Green New Deal _is more than a resolution -- it's a revolution_.** More people are talking about and engaging on climate change than ever before.
>
> ➜ 63% of adults think the Green New Deal is a good idea.
>
> ➜ 60% of registered voters support it, including 86% of Democrats and 64% of independents.
>
> While President Trump and the GOP bury their heads in the sand and deny climate change, Ed is leading a grassroots movement forward to save our planet and grow our economy.
>
> But if we don't have the resources to keep Ed in this fight, we'll be allowing the naysayers and climate deniers to win and put our planet in peril.
>
> _**[Will you stand with Ed today to help us reach this week's goal? Rush $27 before midnight!](https://ma.edmarkey.%3D%3D/?g=-NfBFVNw52hcsCx35ezxeoA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/markey-november2019-weekly?refcode=EM-110819_2&amount=27&recurring=true&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**_

name: Joe Kennedy III
subject: There's a word we don't hear enough in our climate debates:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639095c/55b66746/2ce1a6e8/80f26ae/1904432524/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | When we talk about the climate crisis, there's a lot of familiar vocabulary - renewable energy, cap and trade, carbon emissions, energy efficiency. **But there's a word we don't hear enough in our climate debates: injustice.** There is no question that climate change is an arrow aimed at all of us. But it strikes hardest where public policy failures always do: those we have historically repressed or systemically disenfranchised, from the smoke stacks of Cancer Alley, Louisiana to the fuel tanks of Chelsea, Massachusetts to the streets of Puerto Rico. Where people are more likely to live near toxic industrial facilities and hazardous waste sites. More likely to be subjected to air pollution that drives up childhood asthma rates. More likely to be up against aging infrastructure that puts lead in drinking water. More likely to be paralyzed by disruptions to public services when violent storms and floods and fires sweep through and less likely to have the resources to recover. It is no coincidence that, across the country, these places are disproportionately black and brown, immigrant, poor. It is no coincidence that our country takes advantage of them when it comes to the environment the same way it does when it comes to education, transportation, housing and health care. **I believe that bold, transformative climate policy must do more than prevent future catastrophe. It must repair the damage our communities have already endured.** As an original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal resolution, I think it is a critical framework for an aggressive climate agenda. But now the real work begins. Now Congress needs to flesh out the policy behind the proposal. **And as we do, I'll be fighting to ensure that climate justice is at the center of it.** I hope you'll join me. _Joe_ Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | [$5](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639095c/55b66746/2ce1a6e8/80f26af/1904432524/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZiMjVsZlgwPSI6IjUifQ%3D%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=2019-11-08-climate-justice&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$15](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639095c/55b66746/2ce1a6e8/80f26a8/1904432524/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkSGR2ZlgwPSI6IjE1In0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=2019-11-08-climate-justice&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$25](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639095c/55b66746/2ce1a6e8/80f26a9/1904432524/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZkR2h5WldWOWZRPT0iOiIyNSJ9/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=2019-11-08-climate-justice&refcode2=express-buttons") | [$50](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639095c/55b66746/2ce1a6e8/80f26aa/1904432524/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RpZFhSMGIyNWZabTkxY24xOSI6IjUwIn0%3D/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/stand-with-joe?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=2019-11-08-climate-justice&refcode2=express-buttons")

clean_body: | "" | | When we talk about the climate crisis, there's a lot of familiar vocabulary - renewable energy, cap and trade, carbon emissions, energy efficiency. But there's a word we don't hear enough in our climate debates: injustice. There is no question that climate change is an arrow aimed at all of us. But it strikes hardest where public policy failures always do: those we have historically repressed or systemically disenfranchised, from the smoke stacks of Cancer Alley, Louisiana to the fuel tanks of Chelsea, Massachusetts to the streets of Puerto Rico. Where people are more likely to live near toxic industrial facilities and hazardous waste sites. More likely to be subjected to air pollution that drives up childhood asthma rates. More likely to be up against aging infrastructure that puts lead in drinking water. More likely to be paralyzed by disruptions to public services when violent storms and floods and fires sweep through and less likely to have the resources to recover. It is no coincidence that, across the country, these places are disproportionately black and brown, immigrant, poor. It is no coincidence that our country takes advantage of them when it comes to the environment the same way it does when it comes to education, transportation, housing and health care. I believe that bold, transformative climate policy must do more than prevent future catastrophe. It must repair the damage our communities have already endured. As an original co-sponsor of the Green New Deal resolution, I think it is a critical framework for an aggressive climate agenda. But now the real work begins. Now Congress needs to flesh out the policy behind the proposal. And as we do, I'll be fighting to ensure that climate justice is at the center of it. I hope you'll join me. Joe Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | "" | "" | "" | "" ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts. ---|--- | This email was sent by "". subject: Trump LEAVES Paris Climate Agreement (BREAKING)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of John Delaney
body:
\-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | [ ](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901e7/30fd46cd/32e18471/2354c41d/4073093068/VEsH/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=1+-+++&utm_campaign=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all&source=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all") **VIRTUAL PETITION:[Keep the U.S. in the Paris Climate Agreement »](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901e7/30fd46cd/32e18471/2354c41c/4073093068/VEsE/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/Paris-Climate-Agreement?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=2+-+Keep+the+US+in+the+Paris+Climate+Agreeme&utm_campaign=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all&source=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all")** | **BREAKING NEWS: US notifies UN of intention to withdraw from Paris Climate Agreement**

We need to take urgent action to stop the Trump Administration from withdrawing from the Paris Climate Agreement.

**Sign the petition immediately:** | [SIGN NOW »](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901e7/30fd46cd/32e18471/2354c41f/4073093068/VEsF/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/Paris-Climate-Agreement?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=3+-+SIGN+NOW+raquo&utm_campaign=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all&source=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all")
---
Friends,

Donald Trump has been planning to withdraw from the Paris Climate Agreement since the start of his presidency.

**But this week, he made it official, by submitting intention to withdraw to the United Nations.**

We need to take urgent action to make sure the U.S. stays in the Paris Climate Agreement.
**[If you care about stopping climate change, sign our petition immediately »](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901e7/30fd46cd/32e18471/2354c41e/4073093068/VEsC/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/Paris-Climate-Agreement?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=4+-+If+you+care+about+stopping+climate+chang&utm_campaign=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all&source=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all")**
[](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901e7/30fd46cd/32e18471/2354c419/4073093068/VEsD/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/Paris-Climate-Agreement?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=5&utm_campaign=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all&source=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all")
John Delaney has committed to rejoining the Paris Climate Agreement on Day 1 of his presidency if the U.S. leaves.

That's because he's committed to making the U.S. a global leader in climate policy and new energy technology.

Climate change is a big problem that requires big solutions. That's why John believes it's absolutely critical to stay in the Paris Climate Agreement.

**If you 're with John, sign your name now and demand the U.S. stay in the Paris Climate Agreement:**

**[https://go.johndelaney.com/Paris-Climate-Agreement](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901e7/30fd46cd/32e18471/2354c418/4073093068/VEsA/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://go.johndelaney.com/Paris-Climate-Agreement?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=6+-+httpsgojohndelaneycomParisClimateAgreeme&utm_campaign=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all&source=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all")**

Thanks for your support,
Team Delaney
| [**www.JohnDelaney.com**](https://go.johndelaney.com/page/m/29b901e7/30fd46cd/32e18471/2354c41b/4073093068/VEsB/?g=O8raRzpTVzRcsC_9bxO1vUA "https://www.johndelaney.com/?utm_medium=email&utm_source=johndelaney&utm_content=7+-+wwwJohnDelaneycom&utm_campaign=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all&source=em_ja_2019.11.06_e1_td_paris-agreement_all") | **Text DELANEY to 72727**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Indiana=20Republican=20Party?=
subject: Serving More Hoosiers
body:
Campaigns are all about winning the opportunity to serve Hoosiers. And on Tuesday, voters went to the polls and chose Republicans mayors to serve...

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/indiana/serving-more-hoosiers?e=1acd9bb3d6)

Serving More Hoosiers

Campaigns are all about winning the opportunity to serve Hoosiers. And on Tuesday, voters went to the polls and chose Republicans mayors to serve in their largest numbers EVER. By any measure, Election Day 2019 was an overwhelming success for Indiana Republicans.

In January, we’ll have 70 Republican mayors throughout the entire state. Republican will now lead 23 more mayor’s offices than Democrats – including 19 offices that this year are switching from Democrat to Republican control.

Those flips really are all across our state – Bedford, Southport, Alexandria, Bluffton, Connersville, Greensburg, Hartford City, Jasonville, Kokomo, Logansport, Michigan City, Muncie, Oakland City, Peru, Portland, Rising Sun, Rockport, Salem and Winchester.

We won in former Democrat strongholds like Muncie, Logansport, Michigan City and Kokomo (clean sweep of every race in Kokomo). We’re competitive across the board, and under Governor Holcomb’s leadership, our trajectory continues to look up in 2020 and beyond.

Thank you to everyone – our candidates, our candidates’ families, our grassroots volunteers, our party officers, and more – for making this possible. You are our Indiana Republican Party, and together, we’ll continue Putting People First.

- Kyle Hupfer

PHOTO: Governor Eric Holcomb, Indiana GOP Chairman Hupfer, Mayor-elect Tyler Moore and local candidates for the Kokomo City Council pause for a photo at a rally in Kokomo on Saturday night attended by more than 225 Moore supporters.
Governor Holcomb's Week That Was
Governor Holcomb: Government Leader of the Year

Governor Holcomb has been named the 2019 Government Leader of the Year by the Indiana Chamber of Commerce!

This big honor, which Governor Holcomb accepted on Thursday night at the Indiana Chamber’s 30th Annual Awards Dinner, highlighted his work helping Hoosiers fighting addiction and the impact it has on communities, families and the workforce. The Chamber also touted Governor Holcomb's dedication to improving our state's workforce, increasing Pre-K opportunities for low income families, and expanding broadband access to rural communities.

This recognition is proof that Governor Holcomb is dedicated to Putting People First in all corners of our state, in any stage of their lives.

The Final Weekend: Getting Out the Vote
Winning 70 mayoral races across the state doesn't just happen -- it requires hard work from grassroots volunteers throughout the entire state until the polls close on Election Day. Governor Holcomb and Chairman Hupfer were out the Friday, Saturday and Monday before Election Day holding Get Out the Vote Rallies in cities throughout the entire state with our candidates and volunteers.

Check out some of the photos above, and find even more photos and video on Twitter pages for Governor Holcomb (https://twitter.com/holcombforin?mc_cid=557f3263c1&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) and your Indiana Republican Party (https://twitter.com/indgop?mc_cid=557f3263c1&mc_eid=[UNIQID]) !

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: 5 stories President Trump doesn’t want you to miss
body:
'Coup Has Started,' Whistleblower's Attorney Said in 2017 | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b4ca78c504&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **_FIVE STORIES PRESIDENT TRUMP DOESN'T WANT YOU TO MISS_**
---
| | | [**'Coup Has Started,' Whistleblower's Attorney Said in 2017**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6a71c2f614&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox News
“Mark Zaid, one of the attorneys representing the intelligence community whistleblower at the center of the Democrats' ongoing impeachment inquiry, tweeted conspicuously in January 2017 that a ‘coup has started’ and that ‘impeachment will follow ultimately,’” Gregg Re reports. “We will get rid of him,” Zaid wrote in July 2017.

**Red-handed:** [Dems may have colluded with key witness before complaint was public](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=0201394487&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Real Talk: Impeachment Is Going Poorly For Democrats and The Media**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=fc3a1cbe99&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Federalist_
“Inside of newsrooms, broadcast studios, and Twitter, impeachment is going according to plan,” Mollie Hemingway writes. “Outside of those bubbles, it's not . . . It’s been conducted in secret, with heavy control from Rep. Adam Schiff, D-Calif., the man who falsely claimed for years he had evidence of Trump’s treasonous collusion with Russia.”

**Bottom line:** [“Trump is innocent of accusations about Ukraine”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a57f848d4d&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Economy is Really Experiencing a Middle-Class Boom -- This Data Doesn't Lie**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=08b6e25a6a&e=3ee4985eea)
-Fox Business
The $5,003 rise in middle-class incomes under President Trump is impressive—especially given that incomes rose only $1,200 under former President Obama in the seven years after the recession ended, Stephen Moore writes. “The majority of middle-income households have benefited financially from the Trump economic boom.”

**Resurgence:** [“Small business ‘optimism' at record high, up 160% under Trump”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=690312b05f&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| [**Trump Welcomes Washington Nationals to White House**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8669beaad5&e=3ee4985eea)
-_The Wall Street Journal_
“President Trump welcomed the Washington Nationals to the White House, celebrating the hometown team’s World Series win as ‘a comeback story for the ages,’” Catherine Lucey reports. The “ceremony on Monday featured cheering fans stretched across the grass and a military band that played the team’s unofficial anthem, ‘Baby Shark.’”

** Watch:** [Our nation’s capital celebrates first World Series win in nearly 100 years!](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=af751ae65a&e=3ee4985eea)

-_The Associated Press_
“Visiting Morocco for the first time, Ivanka Trump received a warm welcome Thursday from housewives, widows and other women who are benefiting from new laws that allow them to own land,” Darlene Superville reports. “When you invest in women, they invest back into their families and communities and countries flourish,” Ms. Trump said.

subject: Is there anything GOP won't lie about?

---|---

• | They wanted public hearings but refused to vote for them
---|---

• | They tout national security but then brought unsecured phones into a secure briefing room when they stormed it
---|---

Republicans keep changing their story after the Democrats give them what they ask for and they realize that they're still losing. And now Lindsey Graham is refusing to even read the testimony transcripts? Lindsey and Mitch and Donald are counting on one thing: your willingness to let them get away with all their lies and dirty tricks.

The GOP will only ramp up this strategy as the inquiry progresses and we near the 2020 election. They're going to continue to lie, deny, and turn voters from the truth with their millions in dark corporate PAC money, because they know that when voters know the truth, they vote Democrat.

We need as many people on our team now so we can start pushing back early against these lies. November 2020 is less than a year away, and we need a strong start or we risk being overwhelmed. name: Josh Mahony
subject: We must protect our care
disclaimer_text: paid for by corporations, then contribute any amount to help Josh keep fighting
body:
Republicans like Tom Cotton have spent their entire careers trying to strip healthcare from our children in America.

| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191108hcuninsured&recurring=auto&refcode2=header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Friend,

What we learned yesterday is heartbreaking.

Republicans like Tom Cotton have spent their entire careers trying to strip healthcare from our children in America, and their plan so far has been successful.

We can't sit back and let Republicans rip away healthcare from even more Americans and their families. If they win in 2020, they will try and might succeed.

**[If you're ready to elect a leader who will protect your care and fight to cover every American, chip in $10 now by clicking this link.](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191108hcuninsured&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you,

Josh

P.S. Open Enrollment for healthcare coverage has begun. Use this link to find coverage before December 15: **[https://www.healthcare.gov](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d72/382d5bd5/701d39a/3b075437/1890690149/VEsF/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://www.healthcare.gov")**

_**\--- Begin Forwarded Message ---**_
>
| [](https://secure.joshuamahony.com/page/m/4ea09d72/382d5bd5/701d39a/3b075436/1890690149/VEsC/p/eyJlM3NnYzJ4MVp5QjlmUT09IjoibWFob255LW5vdiIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZW0xOTExMDhoY3VuaW5zdXJlZCJ9/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191108hcuninsured&recurring=auto") **Help Josh protect healthcare for thousands of children in Arkansas:** [CONTRIBUTE](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191108hcuninsured&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
---
Friend,

CNN reported that 400,000 more children are uninsured since 2016.

Tom Cotton cracked a wry smirk when he read this headline. Ok, we don't know that, but we do know he will stop at nothing to strip healthcare away from millions, including children -- and that is abhorrent. He votes in lockstep with National Republicans as they bend over backwards to push their anti-health care agenda on Americans and their families.

**[We cannot afford another six years of Tom Cotton bowing to right-wing special interest groups that want to take healthcare away from millions of Americans. Will you chip in $10 or more to reach our rapid response goal of $5,000 to protect healthcare for our children?](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191108hcuninsured&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")** _If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ [Express Donate $5](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=em191108hcuninsured&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $10](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=em191108hcuninsured&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $25](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=em191108hcuninsured&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=em191108hcuninsured&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Express Donate $100](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=em191108hcuninsured&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
[Donate Other Amount](https://secure.joshuamahony.%3D%3D/?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mahony-nov?refcode=em191108hcuninsured&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=") This statistic makes it clear that Tom Cotton will not work for the people of Arkansas -- he will work for the rich and powerful and the special interests.

We can't sit back and watch Republicans win this race again. It's crucial that we start investing in this campaign today so we can get organized and beat Tom Cotton and the special interests fighting against us.

**[Pitch in $10 now to help us stay on track towards our goal and show Tom Cotton and Mitch McConnell that Arkansas is ready to elect a real leader to the Senate.](https://secure.joshuamahony.?g=x7oqFq0LBwxdSmUxDjMWNpA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mahony-nov?refcode=em191108hcuninsured&recurring=auto&refcode2=biobox&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Thank you for being in this fight,

Team Mahony

body:
It is urgent that we hear from you. Anthony Brindisi and his radical liberal buddies in Congress are failing us. [ ](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=b174bccba233483bbccc4518baff060b&_e=Z9uG5y1pAAQ_AwMi5Z_D-CG7UXU4AsdW_YAMDVSuC3eSosziui0lXiSPE3uNL7O-fHtvleGOq24b52eCTiNa_jtgJx1I6Mzkefcj2JHL5YBrQl4cytvjKEoWl4jnc0Y1YjL0VeZmSCnhRrnGSucZHq4NbhyuEYp59He9tNb7SjPvX_Fnx-Si4YVWCqUqwXM9L0dGO8bkfAOAGjSFympLj4YmI2oXDFfUuyP5Rc51gB-WgWjZiWAxhLPvojOzmqaD-EDaWwDDR3c4sDkkhYldV6nEyBr9i6m0D6zZ0idFsjb8KNCcC7px0ZgoGa5bcM9m36Em3pTjBIw9p7u2eNnjYjQtZpcGXvO-hlhwNWLA6FAQnKcYYb779RJ1VTwEWt7NgEMLLBXIkdz6JqzP0jv8YPsP1j8J5MfsIIiMxNzBpo6EAQDS196wzl_UU4u0NlP6) | |

Peter,

It is urgent that we hear from you. Anthony Brindisi and his radical liberal buddies in Congress are failing us.

You deserve someone in Congress who represents hard-working Upstate New Yorkers— not the D.C. elite.

That’s why I’m determined to defeat Brindisi in 2020, so that I can put you first. But, I need to hear directly from you. **[What’s most important to you?](http://links.claudiaforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e8d915629893476cb837806f005d02de&_m=b174bccba233483bbccc4518baff060b&_e=Z9uG5y1pAAQ_AwMi5Z_D-CG7UXU4AsdW_YAMDVSuC3eSosziui0lXiSPE3uNL7O-fHtvleGOq24b52eCTiNa_jtgJx1I6Mzkefcj2JHL5YBrQl4cytvjKEoWl4jnc0Y1YjL0VeZmSCnhRrnGSucZHq4NbhyuEYp59He9tNb7SjPvX_Fnx-Si4YVWCqUqwXM9L0dGO8bkfAOAGjSFympLj4YmI2oXDFfUuyP5Rc51gB_QxEbr8G77ji8XVL7FTtRhvKj8O0FttyoGosPNkFivnYdHeO5t8l9VdK33WxpzN2uxXxFezWCyw4LcZ3BgvL51hccPioBKVzQ_bjtPcFQlf9Xg6ZPfbxLiqMyFHybWEG3Pn7RyVGXbWrFPKOlpORrnIWkpmXoApHENqFHOYvHWz6OX6CGrtltNN774C54iCIGdZzY3iNVfCRmFRGLP3E_N)**

Can you spare 30 seconds to let me know what issues you want me to focus on in Congress?

**Upstate New York Priorities Survey**
What issues are most important to you?

clean_body: It is urgent that we hear from you. Anthony Brindisi and his radical liberal buddies in Congress are failing us. | | Peter, It is urgent that we hear from you. Anthony Brindisi and his radical liberal buddies in Congress are failing us. You deserve someone in Congress who represents hard-working Upstate New Yorkers— not the D.C. elite. That’s why I’m determined to defeat Brindisi in 2020, so that I can put you first. But, I need to hear directly from you. Can you spare 30 seconds to let me know what issues you want me to focus on in Congress? Upstate New York Priorities Survey What issues are most important to you? Don’t miss out on your opportunity to make your voice heard. Help us stay on track for 2020 by telling us what’s most important to you. Looking forward to your response, Claudia Tenney | | | Paid for by Claudia for Congress | | PO Box 244 Clinton, NY 13323 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

| | I just watched another billionaire enter this race. Another candidate who could flood the race with personal wealth to buy his way to the debates. **That 's what I'm up against for a spot on that stage -- and frankly, I won't make it without you.** **[_I haven 't taken a cent from billionaires or PACs to make the debates. It would mean so much to me to have your $5 to make it instead. Can I count on you in this critical moment? Making that stage and sharing my message is the only way I'll be able to compete against these wealthy candidates. >>_](https://action.julianforthefuture.%3D/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=20191108_em_fr_b3_castro_all&recurring=auto&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")** I didn't start this race off with any advantages. No one like Julian Castro has ever been in the Oval Office. His grandmother immigrated here from Mexico when she was just 7 years old. She never got past the 4th grade, but she provided for her family by working as a maid and a housekeeper.

Now, her grandson is running for President of the United States. Against all odds, grassroots Democrats like YOU helped him qualify for the Democratic debates and sent him to the front of the pack of Democratic candidates.

We know we send you a lot of emails, but that's because we're relying on grassroots supporters to overcome our next big challenge:

Julian must be able to compete and build a movement that lasts for the long haul, and he's not taking a cent of corporate PAC money to do it. Will you be a part of this historic campaign?

**[DONATE](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc813/3eb3e2fc/56ce8d7b/744d9001/364086244/VEsHBQ/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/julian-em?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25&recurring=on&recur_weekly=on")**
Again, we know we send you a lot of emails. We hope you'll stick with us long-term. If you want to stay updated but receive fewer emails, please let us know [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc813/3eb3e2fc/56ce8d7b/744d9000/364086244/VEsHBA/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails"). If you'd like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. Please unsubscribe [here](https://action.julianforthefuture.com/page/m/709fc813/3eb3e2fc/56ce8d7b/744d900f/364086244/VEsHBw/?g=5-wKdTjfd5lcsCTt4S4B-7A "https://action.julianforthefuture.com/unsubscribe"), and we'll make sure to process your request.
